A p p l i c a t i o n \ R i s k \ I R i s k M a n a g e r . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 1 9 K B L I N E S : 7 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Application.Risk; public interface IRiskManager { bool CanEnterPosition(decimal orderSize); bool CanContinueTrading(); void OnTradeClosed(decimal pnl); } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ A 8 4 A l p h a D e c a y M o n i t o r i n g R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 6 . 0 5 K B L I N E S : 1 3 3 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.IO; using System.Linq; using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Backtesting; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; /// /// A84 special reports: /// Alpha Decay Monitoring using portfolio equity timeline only. /// No changes to existing report structures. /// public sealed class A84AlphaDecayMonitoringReportService { public void Generate(PortfolioBacktestResult result) { Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); var equity = result?.PortfolioEquityTimeline; if (equity == null || equity.Count < 20) { Write("A84_03", "A84_03 — ALPHA DECAY (PORTFOLIO)", "NO DATA: PortfolioEquityTimeline is missing or too small."); Write("A84_04", "A84_04 — ALPHA DECAY (ALERTS)", "NO DATA: PortfolioEquityTimeline is missing or too small."); return; } var pts = equity.OrderBy(x => x.Key).Select(x => (t: x.Key, v: x.Value)).ToList(); // Split into early vs late segments (50/50) var half = pts.Count / 2; var early = pts.Take(half).ToList(); var late = pts.Skip(half).ToList(); var earlyRet = SegmentReturn(early); var lateRet = SegmentReturn(late); // Rolling window decay scan (detect recent deterioration) var decayScan = RollingDecayScan(pts, window: Math.Max(20, pts.Count / 10)); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("A84_03 — ALPHA DECAY (PORTFOLIO)"); sb.AppendLine("================================"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine($"Points : {pts.Count}"); sb.AppendLine($"Start equity : {pts.First().v:F2}"); sb.AppendLine($"End equity : {pts.Last().v:F2}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("SEGMENT PERFORMANCE"); sb.AppendLine("-------------------"); sb.AppendLine($"Early 50% return : {earlyRet * 100m:F2}%"); sb.AppendLine($"Late 50% return : {lateRet * 100m:F2}%"); var decayRatio = (earlyRet == 0m) ? 0m : (lateRet / earlyRet); sb.AppendLine($"Decay ratio (late/early): {decayRatio:F3}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("ROLLING DECAY SCAN (latest first)"); sb.AppendLine("---------------------------------"); sb.AppendLine("Window uses simple return over last N points; compares recent window vs previous window."); sb.AppendLine(); foreach (var r in decayScan.Take(12)) { sb.AppendLine( $"{r.endTime:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} | recent {r.recent * 100m,8:F2}% | prev {r.prev * 100m,8:F2}% | delta {(r.recent - r.prev) * 100m,8:F2}%"); } WriteRaw("A84_03", sb.ToString()); // Alerts var alerts = new List(); if (lateRet < 0 && earlyRet > 0) alerts.Add("ALERT: Late-half performance turned negative while early-half was positive (classic alpha decay)."); if (decayRatio > 0 && decayRatio < 0.50m && earlyRet > 0.02m) alerts.Add("ALERT: Late/early decay ratio < 0.50 while early return was meaningful."); var worst = decayScan.OrderBy(x => x.recent - x.prev).FirstOrDefault(); if (worst.endTime != default && (worst.recent - worst.prev) < -0.05m) alerts.Add($"ALERT: Sharp rolling deterioration detected near {worst.endTime:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}."); var sb2 = new StringBuilder(); sb2.AppendLine("A84_04 — ALPHA DECAY (ALERTS)"); sb2.AppendLine("============================="); sb2.AppendLine(); if (alerts.Count == 0) { sb2.AppendLine("NO ALERTS: No strong decay signal under current thresholds."); } else { foreach (var a in alerts) sb2.AppendLine(a); } sb2.AppendLine(); sb2.AppendLine("NEXT ACTIONS (OPERATOR)"); sb2.AppendLine("------------------------"); sb2.AppendLine("1) If decay alerts persist across runs, reduce position sizing and re-rank markets/strategies."); sb2.AppendLine("2) Add per-market equity curves (future upgrade) to localize decay to SYMBOL::TF."); sb2.AppendLine("3) Add slippage/fee model before trusting absolute PnL."); WriteRaw("A84_04", sb2.ToString()); } private static decimal SegmentReturn(List<(DateTime t, decimal v)> seg) { if (seg.Count < 2) return 0m; var start = seg.First().v; var end = seg.Last().v; if (start == 0) return 0m; return (end - start) / start; } private static List<(DateTime endTime, decimal recent, decimal prev)> RollingDecayScan( List<(DateTime t, decimal v)> pts, int window) { var list = new List<(DateTime endTime, decimal recent, decimal prev)>(); // Need two windows back-to-back var step = Math.Max(1, window / 2); for (int end = pts.Count - 1; end >= (2 * window); end -= step) { var recentSeg = pts.Skip(end - window + 1).Take(window).ToList(); var prevSeg = pts.Skip(end - (2 * window) + 1).Take(window).ToList(); var recent = SegmentReturn(recentSeg); var prev = SegmentReturn(prevSeg); list.Add((pts[end].t, recent, prev)); } return list; } private static void Write(string prefix, string title, string body) { var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine(title); sb.AppendLine(new string('=', title.Length)); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine(body); WriteRaw(prefix, sb.ToString()); } private static void WriteRaw(string prefix, string content) { var path = Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"{prefix}_ALPHA_DECAY_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"); File.WriteAllText(path, content); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ A 8 4 C h a t G p t U p l o a d R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 7 . 5 1 K B L I N E S : 1 4 3 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Backtesting; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; /// /// Produces a compact (ChatGPT-paste-friendly) summary of the key system outputs. /// Target size: ~3–4 KB, with 5–10 lines per major section. /// public sealed class A84ChatGptUploadReportService { public void GenerateAndWrite( PortfolioBacktestResult result, DateTime runUtc, IReadOnlyList selectedStrategies, Dictionary? fitness, HashSet? allowedStrategyIds, Dictionary? cioWeightsPostGating) { if (result == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(result)); if (selectedStrategies == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(selectedStrategies)); Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); fitness ??= new Dictionary(); allowedStrategyIds ??= new HashSet(); cioWeightsPostGating ??= new Dictionary(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase); var sb = new StringBuilder(capacity: 5000); var ts = runUtc.ToString("yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"); var outFile = Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"A84_06_CHATGPT_UPLOAD_{runUtc:yyyyMMdd}_{ts}.txt".Replace($"{runUtc:yyyyMMdd}_{runUtc:yyyyMMdd}", runUtc.ToString("yyyyMMdd"))); // ---------- Header ---------- sb.AppendLine("A84_06 — CHATGPT UPLOAD (COMPACT)"); sb.AppendLine("================================"); sb.AppendLine($"Run Timestamp (UTC) : {runUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}"); sb.AppendLine(); // ---------- Architecture state ---------- sb.AppendLine("TQGA — ARCHITECTURE STATE (Institutional Mode)"); sb.AppendLine("---------------------------------------------"); sb.AppendLine("• Market grid: Top20 symbols × 3 TF (1h, 4h, 1d) => 60 markets."); sb.AppendLine("• Backtest: Strategy × Market grid; captures StrategyPnL, SymbolPnL, Symbol×TF PnL, Strategy×Symbol×TF PnL."); sb.AppendLine("• CIO: ranks markets by PnL score (per Symbol×TF) then allocates with caps (per-market + per-symbol)."); sb.AppendLine("• Fitness gating: kills dead strategies (0 trades / low PnL / fitness<=0) before CIO recompute."); sb.AppendLine(); // ---------- Run scope ---------- sb.AppendLine("RUN SCOPE"); sb.AppendLine("---------"); sb.AppendLine($"Strategies Selected : {selectedStrategies.Count}"); for (int i = 0; i < Math.Min(10, selectedStrategies.Count); i++) sb.AppendLine($" S{i + 1:00} {selectedStrategies[i].Name}"); if (selectedStrategies.Count > 10) sb.AppendLine(" ..."); sb.AppendLine(); // ---------- Portfolio snapshot ---------- sb.AppendLine("PORTFOLIO SNAPSHOT"); sb.AppendLine("------------------"); var startEq = 100000m; var endEq = TryGetEndEquity(result, startEq); var retPct = startEq <= 0 ? 0m : ((endEq - startEq) / startEq) * 100m; sb.AppendLine($"Start Equity : {startEq:0.00}"); sb.AppendLine($"End Equity : {endEq:0.00}"); sb.AppendLine($"Total Return : {retPct:0.00}%"); sb.AppendLine($"Equity Points: {result.PortfolioEquityTimeline?.Count ?? 0}"); sb.AppendLine(); // ---------- Top strategies ---------- sb.AppendLine("TOP STRATEGIES (PnL)"); sb.AppendLine("--------------------"); foreach (var x in (result.StrategyPnL ?? new Dictionary()) .OrderByDescending(k => k.Value) .Take(6)) { sb.AppendLine($"S{x.Key:00} PnL {x.Value:0.00}"); } sb.AppendLine(); // ---------- Fitness / gating ---------- sb.AppendLine("FITNESS GATING (summary)"); sb.AppendLine("------------------------"); if (fitness.Count == 0) { sb.AppendLine("No fitness snapshot available."); } else { foreach (var row in fitness.Values .OrderByDescending(r => r.FitnessScore) .Take(6)) { sb.AppendLine($"{row.StrategyCode} | PnL {row.PnL:0.00} | Trades {row.Trades} | Fit {row.FitnessScore:0.000} | Allowed {row.Allowed} | {row.GateReason}"); } sb.AppendLine($"Allowed Strategies: {(allowedStrategyIds.Count == 0 ? "NONE" : string.Join(",", allowedStrategyIds.OrderBy(x => x).Select(x => $"S{x:00}")))}"); } sb.AppendLine(); // ---------- Top markets ---------- sb.AppendLine("TOP MARKETS (Symbol×TF PnL)"); sb.AppendLine("---------------------------"); foreach (var kv in (result.SymbolTimeframePnL ?? new Dictionary(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value) .Take(10)) { sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key} PnL {kv.Value:0.00}"); } sb.AppendLine(); // ---------- CIO allocation post-gating ---------- sb.AppendLine("CIO ALLOCATION (POST-GATING, Top 10)"); sb.AppendLine("-----------------------------------"); if (cioWeightsPostGating.Count == 0) { sb.AppendLine("No CIO post-gating weights available."); } else { foreach (var kv in cioWeightsPostGating .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value) .Take(10)) { sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key} W {(kv.Value * 100m):0.00}%"); } } sb.AppendLine(); // ---------- Walk-forward + realism checklist ---------- sb.AppendLine("REALISM / SURVIVAL CHECKLIST (minimum)"); sb.AppendLine("--------------------------------------"); sb.AppendLine("• Walk-forward: split history into sequential windows; tune on train, validate on next window only."); sb.AppendLine("• Friction: add fees + slippage + spread; stress with 2× and 4× friction multipliers."); sb.AppendLine("• Regime robustness: require stable performance across multiple regime buckets (trend/range/volatile)."); sb.AppendLine("• Risk limits: max exposure per symbol, max drawdown stop, and kill-switch for degraded fitness."); sb.AppendLine("• No-leakage: indicators must use only past candles; avoid using final equity to pick parameters."); sb.AppendLine(); // ---------- What to upload ---------- sb.AppendLine("WHAT TO UPLOAD TO CHATGPT"); sb.AppendLine("-------------------------"); sb.AppendLine("1) This file (A84_06_CHATGPT_UPLOAD)"); sb.AppendLine("2) A84_00 Executive Summary"); sb.AppendLine("3) A84_05 Strategy Fitness + CIO Gating"); sb.AppendLine("4) REPORT_11 Symbol×TF PnL and REPORT_12 CIO weights"); sb.AppendLine(); File.WriteAllText(outFile, sb.ToString(), Encoding.UTF8); } private static decimal TryGetEndEquity(PortfolioBacktestResult result, decimal fallback) { if (result.PortfolioEquityTimeline == null || result.PortfolioEquityTimeline.Count == 0) return fallback; // SortedDictionary => last value is end equity return result.PortfolioEquityTimeline.Last().Value; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ A 8 4 E x e c u t i v e S u m m a r y R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 5 . 5 9 K B L I N E S : 1 1 6 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Backtesting; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class A84ExecutiveSummaryReportService { public void GenerateAndWrite( PortfolioBacktestResult result, DateTime runUtc, IReadOnlyList selectedStrategies, Dictionary cioWeightsFinal, int recentMinutesWindow = 10) { var ts = runUtc.ToString("yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"); var outFile = Path.Combine(DataPaths.Reports, $"A84_00_EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY_{runUtc:yyyyMMdd}_{ts}.txt"); // Equity timeline var eq = result.PortfolioEquityTimeline; var equityPoints = eq.Count; var startTime = eq.Count > 0 ? eq.Keys.Min() : DateTime.MinValue; var endTime = eq.Count > 0 ? eq.Keys.Max() : DateTime.MinValue; var startEquity = eq.Count > 0 ? eq[startTime] : 0m; var endEquity = eq.Count > 0 ? eq[endTime] : 0m; var totalReturnPct = (startEquity <= 0m) ? 0m : ((endEquity / startEquity) - 1m) * 100m; // Strategy list var strategyLines = selectedStrategies .Select((t, idx) => $" S{idx + 1:00} {t.Name}") .ToList(); // Top strategies var topStrategies = result.StrategyPnL .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value) .Select(x => $"S{x.Key:00} {PadRightSafe(StrategyNameFromSelection(selectedStrategies, x.Key), 28)} PnL {x.Value,14:0.00}") .ToList(); // Top markets by PnL (Strategy-agnostic market view) var topMarkets = result.SymbolTimeframePnL .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value) .Take(30) .Select(x => $"{PadRightSafe(x.Key.Replace("::", "::"), 22)} PnL {x.Value,14:0.00}") .ToList(); // Recent files confirmation var recentFiles = new List(); try { if (Directory.Exists(DataPaths.Reports)) { var cutoff = runUtc.AddMinutes(-recentMinutesWindow); recentFiles = Directory .GetFiles(DataPaths.Reports) .Select(f => new FileInfo(f)) .Where(fi => fi.LastWriteTimeUtc >= cutoff && fi.LastWriteTimeUtc <= runUtc.AddMinutes(1)) .OrderByDescending(fi => fi.LastWriteTimeUtc) .Take(50) .Select(fi => $"{fi.LastWriteTimeUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} {fi.Name}") .ToList(); } } catch { // best-effort only } var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("A84_00 — EXECUTIVE SUMMARY (INSTITUTIONAL CONFIRMATION)"); sb.AppendLine("======================================================"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine($"Run Timestamp (UTC) : {runUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("RUN SCOPE"); sb.AppendLine("---------"); sb.AppendLine($"Strategies Selected : {selectedStrategies.Count}"); foreach (var line in strategyLines) sb.AppendLine(line); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("PORTFOLIO PERFORMANCE SNAPSHOT"); sb.AppendLine("------------------------------"); sb.AppendLine($"Equity Points : {equityPoints}"); sb.AppendLine($"Start Time (UTC): {startTime:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}"); sb.AppendLine($"End Time (UTC) : {endTime:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}"); sb.AppendLine($"Start Equity : {startEquity:0.00}"); sb.AppendLine($"End Equity : {endEquity:0.00}"); sb.AppendLine($"Total Return : {totalReturnPct:0.00}%"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("TOP STRATEGIES (by PnL)"); sb.AppendLine("-----------------------"); foreach (var line in topStrategies) sb.AppendLine(line); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("TOP MARKETS (SYMBOL × TF by PnL)"); sb.AppendLine("-------------------------------"); foreach (var line in topMarkets) sb.AppendLine(line); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("CIO ALLOCATION (TOP 20 weights) — POST GATING"); sb.AppendLine("--------------------------------------------"); foreach (var w in cioWeightsFinal.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value).Take(20)) sb.AppendLine($"{PadRightSafe(w.Key, 26)} W {w.Value:P2}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("OUTPUT CONFIRMATION (Recent files in Reports folder)"); sb.AppendLine("---------------------------------------------------"); sb.AppendLine($"Reports Folder : {DataPaths.Reports}"); sb.AppendLine($"Recent Window : last {recentMinutesWindow} minutes (UTC)"); sb.AppendLine($"Recent Files : {recentFiles.Count}"); sb.AppendLine(); foreach (var rf in recentFiles) sb.AppendLine(rf); Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); File.WriteAllText(outFile, sb.ToString(), Encoding.UTF8); } private static string StrategyNameFromSelection(IReadOnlyList selected, int strategyId) { // Your StrategyPnL keys are ints (1..N) by selection order in your system. // If your IDs differ, it still safely resolves. var idx = strategyId - 1; if (idx >= 0 && idx < selected.Count) return selected[idx].Name; return $"Strategy_{strategyId}"; } private static string PadRightSafe(string s, int len) { s ??= ""; return s.Length >= len ? s.Substring(0, len) : s.PadRight(len); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ A 8 4 M a r k e t R e g i m e D e t e c t i o n R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 8 . 1 7 K B L I N E S : 1 9 8 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.IO; using System.Linq; using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Backtesting; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; /// /// A84 special reports orchestrator: /// - A84_01 / A84_01B / A84_01C via A84_RegimeResearchService (cross-sectional) /// - A84_02 / A84_02B via portfolio equity timeline (time-series) /// /// IMPORTANT: /// This class MUST NOT share name/members with A84AlphaDecayMonitoringReportService. /// Keep helper method names unique to prevent accidental ambiguity if pasting mistakes happen. /// public sealed class A84MarketRegimeDetectionReportService { private readonly A84_RegimeResearchService _regime = new(); public void Generate(PortfolioBacktestResult result) { Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); if (result == null) { WriteReportText("A84_01_MARKET_REGIME", "A84_01 — MARKET REGIME", "NO DATA: PortfolioBacktestResult is null."); WriteReportText("A84_02_REGIME_TRANSITIONS", "A84_02 — REGIME TRANSITIONS", "NO DATA: PortfolioBacktestResult is null."); return; } // -------- A84_01 (cross-sectional regime map + ranking + CIO overlay) -------- var pnl = result.SymbolTimeframePnL ?? new Dictionary(); // CIO weights may be keyed as "CIO::SYMBOL::TF" or "SYMBOL::TF" var cioRaw = result.CioSymbolTimeframeWeights ?? new Dictionary(); var cioAligned = AlignCioWeightsToSymbolTf(cioRaw); _regime.Generate(pnl, cioAligned); // -------- A84_02 (portfolio regime transitions based on equity time-series) -------- GeneratePortfolioRegimeTransitions(result.PortfolioEquityTimeline); } private static Dictionary AlignCioWeightsToSymbolTf(Dictionary cioRaw) { var aligned = new Dictionary(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase); foreach (var kv in cioRaw) { var key = kv.Key ?? ""; var w = kv.Value; if (w <= 0) continue; if (key.StartsWith("CIO::", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) key = key.Substring("CIO::".Length); aligned[key] = w; } // Normalize to sum=1 var sum = aligned.Values.Sum(); if (sum > 0) { var keys = aligned.Keys.ToList(); foreach (var k in keys) aligned[k] = aligned[k] / sum; } return aligned; } private void GeneratePortfolioRegimeTransitions(IReadOnlyDictionary equityTimeline) { if (equityTimeline == null || equityTimeline.Count < 30) { WriteReportText( "A84_02_REGIME_TRANSITIONS", "A84_02 — REGIME TRANSITIONS (PORTFOLIO)", "NO DATA: PortfolioEquityTimeline missing or too small."); WriteReportText( "A84_02B_REGIME_STATS", "A84_02B — REGIME STATS (PORTFOLIO)", "NO DATA: PortfolioEquityTimeline missing or too small."); return; } var pts = equityTimeline .OrderBy(x => x.Key) .Select(x => (t: x.Key, v: x.Value)) .ToList(); // Window heuristic int window = Math.Max(20, pts.Count / 15); var labels = new List<(DateTime t, string regime, decimal slope, decimal vol)>(); for (int i = window; i < pts.Count; i++) { var slice = pts.Skip(i - window).Take(window).ToList(); var slope = EstimateSlopePerStep(slice); var vol = EstimateVolOfStepReturns(slice); var regime = ClassifyPortfolioRegime(slope, vol); labels.Add((pts[i].t, regime, slope, vol)); } // ---- A84_02 transitions ---- var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("A84_02 — REGIME TRANSITIONS (PORTFOLIO)"); sb.AppendLine("======================================="); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine($"Window : {window} points"); sb.AppendLine($"Points analyzed : {labels.Count}"); sb.AppendLine(); string? prev = null; DateTime? start = null; foreach (var x in labels) { if (prev == null) { prev = x.regime; start = x.t; continue; } if (!string.Equals(prev, x.regime, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { sb.AppendLine($"{start:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm} → {x.t:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm} {prev} → {x.regime}"); prev = x.regime; start = x.t; } } WriteReportFile("A84_02_REGIME_TRANSITIONS", sb.ToString()); // ---- A84_02B stats ---- var sb2 = new StringBuilder(); sb2.AppendLine("A84_02B — REGIME STATS (PORTFOLIO)"); sb2.AppendLine("=================================="); sb2.AppendLine(); sb2.AppendLine($"Window : {window} points"); sb2.AppendLine($"Points analyzed : {labels.Count}"); sb2.AppendLine(); foreach (var g in labels.GroupBy(x => x.regime).OrderByDescending(g => g.Count())) { var pct = (decimal)g.Count() / labels.Count; sb2.AppendLine($"{g.Key,-14} {g.Count(),6} {pct,8:P2}"); } sb2.AppendLine(); var last = labels.Last(); sb2.AppendLine($"Current Regime : {last.regime}"); sb2.AppendLine($"Slope (norm) : {last.slope:F6}"); sb2.AppendLine($"Vol (norm) : {last.vol:F6}"); WriteReportFile("A84_02B_REGIME_STATS", sb2.ToString()); } private static decimal EstimateSlopePerStep(List<(DateTime t, decimal v)> slice) { if (slice.Count < 2) return 0m; var first = slice.First().v; var last = slice.Last().v; if (first == 0) return 0m; var n = slice.Count; var ret = (last - first) / first; // total window return return ret / n; // per-step normalized slope } private static decimal EstimateVolOfStepReturns(List<(DateTime t, decimal v)> slice) { if (slice.Count < 3) return 0m; var rets = new List(slice.Count - 1); for (int i = 1; i < slice.Count; i++) { var prev = slice[i - 1].v; var cur = slice[i].v; if (prev == 0) continue; rets.Add((cur - prev) / prev); } if (rets.Count < 2) return 0m; var mean = rets.Average(); var variance = rets.Sum(r => (r - mean) * (r - mean)) / (rets.Count - 1); return SqrtDecimal(variance); } private static string ClassifyPortfolioRegime(decimal slope, decimal vol) { // conservative thresholds if (vol > 0.0125m) { if (slope > 0.0005m) return "HIGHVOL_UP"; if (slope < -0.0005m) return "HIGHVOL_DN"; return "HIGHVOL"; } if (slope > 0.0006m) return "TREND_UP"; if (slope < -0.0006m) return "TREND_DN"; return "RANGE"; } private static decimal SqrtDecimal(decimal x) { if (x <= 0) return 0m; decimal g = (decimal)Math.Sqrt((double)x); for (int i = 0; i < 6; i++) g = (g + x / g) / 2m; return g; } private static void WriteReportText(string name, string title, string body) { var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine(title); sb.AppendLine(new string('=', Math.Max(10, title.Length))); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine(body); WriteReportFile(name, sb.ToString()); } private static void WriteReportFile(string name, string content) { File.WriteAllText( Path.Combine(DataPaths.Reports, $"{name}_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"), content); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ A 8 4 S t r a t e g y F i t n e s s G a t i n g R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 9 . 1 1 K B L I N E S : 2 0 9 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Backtesting; using TQGA.Application.Paths; using TQGA.Application.Portfolio; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class A84StrategyFitnessGatingReportService { public sealed class FitnessConfig { public int MinTrades { get; init; } = 30; // institutional minimum sample public decimal MinPnL { get; init; } = 0m; // must be > 0 to be eligible public int MaxStrategiesAllowed { get; init; } = 50; // safety public int TopKMarkets { get; init; } = 20; // CIO topK public decimal MaxWeightPerMarket { get; init; } = 0.10m; public decimal MaxWeightPerSymbol { get; init; } = 0.25m; // matches your CIO engine default idea } public sealed class FitnessRow { public int StrategyId { get; init; } public string StrategyCode { get; init; } = ""; public decimal PnL { get; init; } public int Trades { get; init; } public int Exits { get; init; } public decimal FitnessScore { get; init; } public bool Allowed { get; init; } public string GateReason { get; init; } = ""; } public (Dictionary fitness, HashSet allowedIds) ComputeFitness( PortfolioBacktestResult result, FitnessConfig cfg) { var fitness = new Dictionary(); var allowed = new HashSet(); foreach (var kv in result.StrategyPnL.OrderBy(k => k.Key)) { var sid = kv.Key; var pnl = kv.Value; result.StrategyDiagnostics.TryGetValue(sid, out var diag); var trades = diag?.ExecutedEntries ?? 0; var exits = diag?.ExecutedExits ?? 0; // Fitness: smooth + sample-size aware // - require positive pnl // - require min trades // score ~ log(1+return%) * sqrt(trades) var startEquity = 100_000m; // PortfolioBacktestRunner uses 100k capital var retPct = startEquity <= 0 ? 0 : (pnl / startEquity) * 100m; decimal scoreCore = 0m; if (retPct > 0m && trades > 0) { var logTerm = (decimal)Math.Log(1.0 + (double)(retPct / 100m)); var sqrtTrades = (decimal)Math.Sqrt(trades); scoreCore = logTerm * sqrtTrades; } bool allowedFlag = true; string reason = "OK"; if (trades < cfg.MinTrades) { allowedFlag = false; reason = $"GATED: trades<{cfg.MinTrades}"; } else if (pnl <= cfg.MinPnL) { allowedFlag = false; reason = $"GATED: pnl<= {cfg.MinPnL:0.##}"; } else if (scoreCore <= 0m) { allowedFlag = false; reason = "GATED: fitness<=0"; } var row = new FitnessRow { StrategyId = sid, StrategyCode = $"S{sid:00}", PnL = pnl, Trades = trades, Exits = exits, FitnessScore = scoreCore, Allowed = allowedFlag, GateReason = reason }; fitness[sid] = row; if (allowedFlag) allowed.Add(sid); } // Safety clamp if (allowed.Count > cfg.MaxStrategiesAllowed) { allowed = allowed .OrderByDescending(id => fitness[id].FitnessScore) .Take(cfg.MaxStrategiesAllowed) .ToHashSet(); } // update Allowed flags if clamped foreach (var id in fitness.Keys.ToList()) { var r = fitness[id]; if (!allowed.Contains(id) && r.Allowed) { fitness[id] = new FitnessRow { StrategyId = r.StrategyId, StrategyCode = r.StrategyCode, PnL = r.PnL, Trades = r.Trades, Exits = r.Exits, FitnessScore = r.FitnessScore, Allowed = false, GateReason = "GATED: max strategies clamp" }; } } return (fitness, allowed); } public Dictionary RecomputeCioWeightsWithGating( PortfolioBacktestResult result, HashSet allowedStrategyIds, FitnessConfig cfg) { // Build MarketKey scoreByMarket using ONLY allowed strategies var scoreByMarket = new Dictionary(); foreach (var kv in result.StrategySymbolTimeframePnL) { // Key format: "S02::ATOMUSDT::1h" if (!TryParseStrategySymbolTfKey(kv.Key, out var sid, out var symbol, out var tf)) continue; if (!allowedStrategyIds.Contains(sid)) continue; var mk = new MarketKey(symbol, tf); if (!scoreByMarket.ContainsKey(mk)) scoreByMarket[mk] = 0m; scoreByMarket[mk] += kv.Value; // PnL accumulation } var cio = new CioDynamicReallocationEngine( topK: cfg.TopKMarkets, minWeight: 0.00m, maxWeight: cfg.MaxWeightPerMarket, maxWeightPerSymbol: cfg.MaxWeightPerSymbol); var weights = cio.ComputeWeights(scoreByMarket); // Convert to existing report key format: "CIO::ATOMUSDT::1h" return weights.ToDictionary( x => $"CIO::{x.Key.Symbol}::{x.Key.Timeframe}", x => x.Value); } public void GenerateAndWrite( PortfolioBacktestResult result, DateTime runUtc, FitnessConfig? cfg = null) { cfg ??= new FitnessConfig(); var (fitness, allowed) = ComputeFitness(result, cfg); var newCioWeights = RecomputeCioWeightsWithGating(result, allowed, cfg); // Write report var ts = runUtc.ToString("yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"); var outFile = Path.Combine(DataPaths.Reports, $"A84_05_STRATEGY_FITNESS_20260304_{ts}.txt".Replace("20260304", runUtc.ToString("yyyyMMdd"))); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("A84_05 — STRATEGY FITNESS + CIO GATING"); sb.AppendLine("===================================="); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine($"Run Timestamp (UTC) : {runUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("FITNESS CONFIG"); sb.AppendLine("--------------"); sb.AppendLine($"MinTrades : {cfg.MinTrades}"); sb.AppendLine($"MinPnL : {cfg.MinPnL:0.##}"); sb.AppendLine($"TopKMarkets : {cfg.TopKMarkets}"); sb.AppendLine($"MaxWeightPerMarket : {cfg.MaxWeightPerMarket:P2}"); sb.AppendLine($"MaxWeightPerSymbol : {cfg.MaxWeightPerSymbol:P2}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("STRATEGY FITNESS TABLE"); sb.AppendLine("----------------------"); sb.AppendLine("Code | PnL | Trades | Exits | Fitness | Allowed | GateReason"); sb.AppendLine("-----+-------------+--------+-------+-----------+---------+---------------------------"); foreach (var row in fitness.Values.OrderByDescending(r => r.FitnessScore)) { sb.AppendLine( $"{row.StrategyCode,-4} | {row.PnL,11:0.00} | {row.Trades,6} | {row.Exits,5} | {row.FitnessScore,9:0.0000} | {(row.Allowed ? "YES" : "NO "),-7} | {row.GateReason}"); } sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine($"Allowed strategies : {allowed.Count} / {fitness.Count}"); sb.AppendLine($"Allowed list : {string.Join(", ", allowed.OrderBy(x => x).Select(x => $"S{x:00}"))}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("CIO WEIGHTS (POST-GATING) TOP 20"); sb.AppendLine("-------------------------------"); foreach (var w in newCioWeights .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value) .Take(20)) { sb.AppendLine($"{w.Key,-22} W {w.Value:P2}"); } Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); File.WriteAllText(outFile, sb.ToString(), Encoding.UTF8); } private static bool TryParseStrategySymbolTfKey(string key, out int strategyId, out string symbol, out string timeframe) { strategyId = 0; symbol = ""; timeframe = ""; // Expected: S02::ATOMUSDT::1h var parts = key.Split(new[] { "::" }, StringSplitOptions.None); if (parts.Length != 3) return false; var s = parts[0].Trim(); if (!s.StartsWith("S", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) return false; if (!int.TryParse(s.Substring(1), out strategyId)) return false; symbol = parts[1].Trim(); timeframe = parts[2].Trim(); return !(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(symbol) || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(timeframe)); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ A 8 4 S t r a t e g y F i t n e s s R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 6 . 9 7 K B L I N E S : 1 6 5 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.IO; using System.Linq; using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Backtesting; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; /// /// A84_05 — STRATEGY FITNESS (Institutional heuristic) /// Uses ONLY existing PortfolioBacktestResult fields: /// - StrategyPnL (Dictionary) /// - StrategyDiagnostics (Dictionary) /// /// No dependency on non-existent fields like StrategyTrades. /// public sealed class A84StrategyFitnessReportService { public void Generate(PortfolioBacktestResult result) { Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); if (result is null) { WriteReportText( "A84_05_STRATEGY_FITNESS", "A84_05 — STRATEGY FITNESS", "NO DATA: PortfolioBacktestResult is null."); return; } var pnlByStrategy = result.StrategyPnL ?? new Dictionary(); var diagByStrategy = result.StrategyDiagnostics ?? new Dictionary(); if (pnlByStrategy.Count == 0 && diagByStrategy.Count == 0) { WriteReportText( "A84_05_STRATEGY_FITNESS", "A84_05 — STRATEGY FITNESS", "NO DATA: StrategyPnL and StrategyDiagnostics are empty."); return; } // Normalize PnL magnitude so it doesn't dominate everything. var maxAbsPnL = pnlByStrategy.Count == 0 ? 1m : pnlByStrategy.Values.Select(v => Math.Abs(v)).DefaultIfEmpty(1m).Max(); if (maxAbsPnL <= 0) maxAbsPnL = 1m; // Union of strategy IDs from both dicts var ids = pnlByStrategy.Keys .Concat(diagByStrategy.Keys) .Distinct() .OrderBy(x => x) .ToList(); var rows = new List(ids.Count); foreach (var id in ids) { pnlByStrategy.TryGetValue(id, out var pnl); diagByStrategy.TryGetValue(id, out var d); var ticks = d?.TicksProcessed ?? 0; var entryAttempts = d?.EntryAttempts ?? 0; var executedEntries = d?.ExecutedEntries ?? 0; var executedExits = d?.ExecutedExits ?? 0; var signalLong = d?.SignalLong ?? 0; var signalExit = d?.SignalExit ?? 0; // Trades proxy: executed entries var trades = executedEntries; // Execution quality proxies decimal execRate = SafeDiv(executedEntries, entryAttempts); // 0..1 decimal completionRate = SafeDiv(executedExits, Math.Max(1, executedEntries)); // 0..1 decimal churnPenalty = entryAttempts <= 0 ? 0m : SafeDiv(entryAttempts - executedEntries, entryAttempts); // 0..1 decimal discipline = SafeDiv(signalExit, Math.Max(1, signalLong)); // 0..1-ish // PnL scoring decimal pnlScore = Clamp01(Math.Abs(pnl) / maxAbsPnL); decimal directionScore = pnl >= 0 ? 1.0m : 0.0m; decimal activityScore = Clamp01(trades / 5000m); // tune later // Institutional fitness (bounded, deterministic) decimal fitness = (pnlScore * 0.45m) + (directionScore * 0.15m) + (activityScore * 0.20m) + (execRate * 0.10m) + (completionRate * 0.10m) - (churnPenalty * 0.10m); // Hard kill-switch: dead strategy => zero fitness if (trades <= 0) fitness = 0m; rows.Add(new Row( Id: id, PnL: pnl, Ticks: ticks, Trades: trades, EntryAttempts: entryAttempts, ExecutedEntries: executedEntries, ExecutedExits: executedExits, ExecRate: execRate, CompletionRate: completionRate, Discipline: discipline, ChurnPenalty: churnPenalty, Fitness: fitness )); } var ranked = rows .OrderByDescending(r => r.Fitness) .ThenByDescending(r => r.PnL) .ToList(); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("A84_05 — STRATEGY FITNESS"); sb.AppendLine("========================="); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("Fitness is a bounded institutional score (0..1) using StrategyPnL + StrategyDiagnostics."); sb.AppendLine("Dead strategies (0 trades) are forced to Fitness 0."); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine($"MaxAbsPnL normalization : {maxAbsPnL:F2}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("Rank | Strat | Fitness | PnL | Trades | ExecRate | ExitCov | Churn | Discipline"); sb.AppendLine("-----+-------+---------+---------------+--------+----------+---------+--------+-----------"); int rank = 1; foreach (var r in ranked) { var strat = $"S{r.Id:00}"; sb.AppendLine( $"{rank,4} | {strat,-5} | {r.Fitness,7:F3} | {r.PnL,13:F2} | {r.Trades,6} | {r.ExecRate,8:P2} | {r.CompletionRate,7:P2} | {r.ChurnPenalty,6:P2} | {r.Discipline,9:P2}"); rank++; } sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("CIO Action Hint:"); sb.AppendLine("- Only allocate capital to strategies with Fitness >= 0.25 and Trades > 0."); sb.AppendLine("- If Fitness=0, the strategy is inactive (signals not firing or execution path blocked)."); WriteReportFile("A84_05_STRATEGY_FITNESS", sb.ToString()); } private static decimal SafeDiv(int a, int b) => b <= 0 ? 0m : (decimal)a / b; private static decimal Clamp01(decimal x) { if (x < 0m) return 0m; if (x > 1m) return 1m; return x; } private static void WriteReportText(string name, string title, string body) { var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine(title); sb.AppendLine(new string('=', Math.Max(10, title.Length))); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine(body); WriteReportFile(name, sb.ToString()); } private static void WriteReportFile(string name, string content) { var ts = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"); File.WriteAllText( Path.Combine(DataPaths.Reports, $"{name}_{ts}.txt"), content, Encoding.UTF8); } private sealed record Row( int Id, decimal PnL, long Ticks, int Trades, int EntryAttempts, int ExecutedEntries, int ExecutedExits, decimal ExecRate, decimal CompletionRate, decimal Discipline, decimal ChurnPenalty, decimal Fitness); } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ A 8 4 _ R e g i m e R e s e a r c h S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 4 . 6 3 K B L I N E S : 1 2 4 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Paths; using TQGA.Application.Portfolio; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class A84_RegimeResearchService { public void Generate( Dictionary symbolTfPnL, Dictionary cioWeights) { GenerateMarketRegime(symbolTfPnL); GenerateMarketRanking(symbolTfPnL); GenerateCioSkill(cioWeights); GenerateGrowthProjection(symbolTfPnL); } private void GenerateMarketRegime(Dictionary pnl) { var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("A84_01 — MARKET REGIME MAP"); sb.AppendLine("==========================="); sb.AppendLine(); if (pnl == null || pnl.Count == 0) { sb.AppendLine("NO DATA: SymbolTimeframePnL is empty."); Write("A84_01_MARKET_REGIME", sb); return; } foreach (var kv in pnl.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value).Take(30)) { var regime = DetectRegime(kv.Value); sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key,-20} {kv.Value,12:F2} {regime}"); } Write("A84_01_MARKET_REGIME", sb); } private void GenerateMarketRanking(Dictionary pnl) { var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("A84_02 — MARKET EDGE RANKING"); sb.AppendLine("============================"); sb.AppendLine(); if (pnl == null || pnl.Count == 0) { sb.AppendLine("NO DATA: SymbolTimeframePnL is empty."); Write("A84_02_MARKET_RANKING", sb); return; } int rank = 1; foreach (var kv in pnl.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)) { sb.AppendLine($"{rank,3} | {kv.Key,-20} | {kv.Value,12:F2}"); rank++; } Write("A84_02_MARKET_RANKING", sb); } private void GenerateCioSkill(Dictionary weights) { var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("A84_03 — CIO ALLOCATION SKILL"); sb.AppendLine("=============================="); sb.AppendLine(); if (weights == null || weights.Count == 0) { sb.AppendLine("NO DATA: CIO weights are empty."); sb.AppendLine("Markets Allocated : 0"); sb.AppendLine("Max Weight : 0.00%"); sb.AppendLine("CIO Rating : No Allocation"); Write("A84_03_CIO_RATING", sb); return; } var concentration = weights.Values.DefaultIfEmpty(0m).Max(); var diversification = weights.Count; sb.AppendLine($"Markets Allocated : {diversification}"); sb.AppendLine($"Max Weight : {concentration:P2}"); string rating = concentration < 0.10m ? "Institutional" : concentration < 0.20m ? "Professional" : "Concentrated"; sb.AppendLine($"CIO Rating : {rating}"); Write("A84_03_CIO_RATING", sb); } private void GenerateGrowthProjection(Dictionary pnl) { var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("A84_04 — SYSTEM GROWTH PROJECTION"); sb.AppendLine("================================="); sb.AppendLine(); if (pnl == null || pnl.Count == 0) { sb.AppendLine("NO DATA: SymbolTimeframePnL is empty."); Write("A84_04_GROWTH_PROJECTION", sb); return; } var totalEdge = pnl.Values.Sum(); decimal monthlyRoi = totalEdge > 200000m ? 0.07m : totalEdge > 100000m ? 0.05m : 0.03m; sb.AppendLine($"Estimated Monthly ROI : {monthlyRoi:P2}"); decimal capital = 10000m; for (int y = 1; y <= 10; y++) { capital *= (1m + monthlyRoi * 12m); sb.AppendLine($"Year {y,2} → {capital,12:F0} USD"); } Write("A84_04_GROWTH_PROJECTION", sb); } private string DetectRegime(decimal pnl) { if (pnl > 40000m) return "STRONG TREND"; if (pnl > 10000m) return "TREND"; if (pnl > 0m) return "WEAK TREND"; if (pnl > -5000m) return "RANGE"; return "HOSTILE"; } private void Write(string name, StringBuilder sb) { Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); File.WriteAllText( Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"{name}_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"), sb.ToString()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ A l p h a R a n k i n g R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 4 . 0 3 K B L I N E S : 9 1 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.IO; using System.Linq; using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Backtesting; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class AlphaRankingReportService { // Institutional fix: // - Do NOT resolve a DI-scoped TradeDecisionDiagnostics here. // - Always read diagnostics snapshots from PortfolioBacktestResult (per-strategy). public void Generate(PortfolioBacktestResult? result) { Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("REPORT 05 — ALPHA DIAGNOSTICS (PER STRATEGY)"); sb.AppendLine("==========================================="); sb.AppendLine(); if (result == null) { sb.AppendLine("NO DATA: result is null."); Write(sb); return; } var strategyPnL = result.StrategyPnL ?? new Dictionary(); var strategyDiagnostics = result.StrategyDiagnostics ?? new Dictionary(); bool hasPnL = strategyPnL.Count > 0; bool hasDiag = strategyDiagnostics.Count > 0; if (!hasPnL && !hasDiag) { sb.AppendLine("NO DATA: StrategyPnL and StrategyDiagnostics are empty."); sb.AppendLine("NOTE: Ensure PortfolioBacktestRunner populates StrategyDiagnostics snapshots per strategy."); Write(sb); return; } var ids = new HashSet(); if (hasPnL) { foreach (int id in strategyPnL.Keys) ids.Add(id); } if (hasDiag) { foreach (int id in strategyDiagnostics.Keys) ids.Add(id); } sb.AppendLine("ID | PnL | Ticks | Long | Short | Exit | EntryAtt | EntryOK | ExitOK"); sb.AppendLine("----+------------+-----------+---------+---------+---------+----------+----------+--------"); foreach (int id in ids.OrderBy(i => i)) { strategyPnL.TryGetValue(id, out decimal pnl); TradeDecisionDiagnosticsSnapshot? snapshot = null; bool hasSnapshot = false; if (hasDiag) hasSnapshot = strategyDiagnostics.TryGetValue(id, out snapshot); int ticksProcessed = hasSnapshot && snapshot != null ? snapshot.TicksProcessed : 0; int signalLong = hasSnapshot && snapshot != null ? snapshot.SignalLong : 0; int signalShort = hasSnapshot && snapshot != null ? snapshot.SignalShort : 0; int signalExit = hasSnapshot && snapshot != null ? snapshot.SignalExit : 0; int entryAttempts = hasSnapshot && snapshot != null ? snapshot.EntryAttempts : 0; int executedEntries = hasSnapshot && snapshot != null ? snapshot.ExecutedEntries : 0; int executedExits = hasSnapshot && snapshot != null ? snapshot.ExecutedExits : 0; sb.AppendLine(string.Format( "{0,2:00} | {1,10:F2} | {2,9} | {3,7} | {4,7} | {5,7} | {6,8} | {7,8} | {8,6}", id, pnl, ticksProcessed, signalLong, signalShort, signalExit, entryAttempts, executedEntries, executedExits)); } sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("NOTES"); sb.AppendLine("-----"); sb.AppendLine("- This report is generated from PortfolioBacktestResult snapshots (institutional-safe)."); sb.AppendLine("- If counts are zero, verify TradingEngine increments diagnostics and Runner stores snapshots."); Write(sb); } private static void Write(StringBuilder sb) { string path = Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"REPORT_05_ALPHA_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"); File.WriteAllText(path, sb.ToString()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ C i o C a p i t a l R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 2 . 9 1 K B L I N E S : 6 0 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class CioCapitalReportService { public void Generate(Dictionary weights) { Generate( strategyWeights: weights, marketAllocationWeights: null, cashWeight: 0m); } public void Generate( Dictionary strategyWeights, IReadOnlyDictionary? marketAllocationWeights, decimal cashWeight) { ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(strategyWeights); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("REPORT 06 — CAPITAL ALLOCATION"); sb.AppendLine("================================"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("SECTION A — STRATEGY TRUST WEIGHTS"); sb.AppendLine("----------------------------------"); foreach (var w in strategyWeights.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)) sb.AppendLine($"Strategy {w.Key:00} -> {(w.Value * 100m):F2}%"); sb.AppendLine(); if (marketAllocationWeights is not null && marketAllocationWeights.Count > 0) { sb.AppendLine("SECTION B — REALISTIC MARKET CAPITAL ALLOCATION"); sb.AppendLine("-----------------------------------------------"); foreach (var kv in marketAllocationWeights.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)) sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key} -> {(kv.Value * 100m):F2}%"); sb.AppendLine($"CASH -> {(cashWeight * 100m):F2}%"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("SECTION C — ALLOCATION QUALITY METRICS"); sb.AppendLine("--------------------------------------"); int marketCount = marketAllocationWeights.Count; decimal maxWeight = marketAllocationWeights.Values.DefaultIfEmpty(0m).Max(); decimal minWeight = marketAllocationWeights.Values.DefaultIfEmpty(0m).Min(); decimal totalAllocated = marketAllocationWeights.Values.Sum(); sb.AppendLine($"Markets Allocated: {marketCount}"); sb.AppendLine($"Total Market Allocation: {(totalAllocated * 100m):F2}%"); sb.AppendLine($"Cash Allocation: {(cashWeight * 100m):F2}%"); sb.AppendLine($"Max Market Weight: {(maxWeight * 100m):F2}%"); sb.AppendLine($"Min Market Weight: {(minWeight * 100m):F2}%"); if (maxWeight > 0.25m) sb.AppendLine("WARNING: High concentration"); if (marketCount < 5) sb.AppendLine("WARNING: Low diversification"); if (cashWeight > 0.25m) sb.AppendLine("WARNING: High idle cash"); } File.WriteAllText( Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"REPORT_06_CAPITAL_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"), sb.ToString()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ C i o W e i g h t s S y m b o l T i m e f r a m e R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 1 . 5 7 K B L I N E S : 3 6 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class CioWeightsSymbolTimeframeReportService { public void Generate(Dictionary cioSymbolTimeframeWeights) { Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("REPORT 12 — CIO WEIGHTS (SYMBOL × TIMEFRAME)"); sb.AppendLine("==========================================="); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("Key format: CIO::SYMBOL::TF (example: CIO::ATOMUSDT::1h)"); sb.AppendLine(); if (cioSymbolTimeframeWeights == null || cioSymbolTimeframeWeights.Count == 0) { sb.AppendLine("NO DATA"); } else { sb.AppendLine("TOP 50 (by weight)"); sb.AppendLine("------------------"); foreach (var kv in cioSymbolTimeframeWeights.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value).Take(50)) sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key,-28} {kv.Value,10:F6}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("FULL LIST (sorted by weight desc)"); sb.AppendLine("---------------------------------"); foreach (var kv in cioSymbolTimeframeWeights.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)) sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key,-28} {kv.Value,10:F6}"); } var path = Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"REPORT_12_CIO_WEIGHTS_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"); File.WriteAllText(path, sb.ToString()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ F u l l R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 2 . 5 4 K B L I N E S : 6 4 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class FullReportService { // We include both text and CSV outputs in the combined report. // This fixes: "FULL REPORT only contains architecture". private static readonly string[] IncludeExtensions = { ".txt", ".csv" }; public string BuildCombinedReport() { var sb = new StringBuilder(); var files = Directory .EnumerateFiles(DataPaths.Reports, "*.*", SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly) .Where(f => IncludeExtensions.Contains(Path.GetExtension(f), StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) .OrderBy(f => Path.GetFileName(f), StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase) .ToList(); if (files.Count == 0) { sb.AppendLine("TQGA FULL REPORT"); sb.AppendLine("==============="); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine($"No report files found in: {DataPaths.Reports}"); sb.AppendLine($"Expected extensions: {string.Join(", ", IncludeExtensions)}"); return sb.ToString(); } sb.AppendLine("TQGA FULL REPORT"); sb.AppendLine("==============="); sb.AppendLine($"Folder: {DataPaths.Reports}"); sb.AppendLine($"Files: {files.Count}"); sb.AppendLine($"UTC: {DateTime.UtcNow:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}"); sb.AppendLine(); foreach (var file in files) { var name = Path.GetFileName(file); var ext = Path.GetExtension(file); sb.AppendLine($"FILE: {name}"); sb.AppendLine(new string('-', 70)); // CSV: keep it readable but still raw (institutional audit friendly) // TXT: raw sb.AppendLine(File.ReadAllText(file)); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine(new string('=', 70)); sb.AppendLine(); } return sb.ToString(); } public string BuildChatGptSizedReport(int maxChars = 120_000) { var full = BuildCombinedReport(); if (full.Length <= maxChars) return full; // Keep deterministic truncation (no exceptions) return full[..maxChars]; } public string SaveCombinedToFile() { var text = BuildCombinedReport(); var path = Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"FULL_REPORT_{DateTime.Now:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"); File.WriteAllText(path, text); return path; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ G i t H u b P a g e s P u b l i s h S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 1 9 . 6 9 K B L I N E S : 4 0 4 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.ComponentModel; using System.Diagnostics; using System.Text; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class GitHubPagesPublishService { private const string RepoPathConfigFileName = "github_pages_repo_path.txt"; private const int WebSafeMaxChars = 500_000; public GitHubPagesPublishResult PublishReportAll31( string sourceReportPath, string sourceReportText, string repoRootPath) { ArgumentException.ThrowIfNullOrWhiteSpace(sourceReportPath); ArgumentException.ThrowIfNullOrWhiteSpace(sourceReportText); ArgumentException.ThrowIfNullOrWhiteSpace(repoRootPath); if (!File.Exists(sourceReportPath)) throw new FileNotFoundException("Source report file not found.", sourceReportPath); if (!Directory.Exists(repoRootPath)) throw new DirectoryNotFoundException($"GitHub Pages repo folder not found: {repoRootPath}"); EnsureGitRepository(repoRootPath); string timestamp = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"); string sourceFileName = Path.GetFileName(sourceReportPath); // IMPORTANT: // Keep full archives OUTSIDE the GitHub Pages repo. string localArchiveRoot = GetLocalArchiveRoot(repoRootPath); Directory.CreateDirectory(localArchiveRoot); string archivedReportPath = Path.Combine( localArchiveRoot, $"REPORT_ALL_31_{timestamp}.txt"); string latestReportPath = Path.Combine(repoRootPath, "FULL_REPORT_LATEST.txt"); string latestHtmlPath = Path.Combine(repoRootPath, "index.html"); string reportsIndexHtmlPath = Path.Combine(repoRootPath, "reports.html"); string gitIgnorePath = Path.Combine(repoRootPath, ".gitignore"); // Full heavy report stays only in local archive. File.Copy(sourceReportPath, archivedReportPath, overwrite: true); // Web-safe publish content only. string webSafeText = TrimReportForWeb(sourceReportText, WebSafeMaxChars); File.WriteAllText(latestReportPath, webSafeText, Encoding.UTF8); string html = BuildHtmlAuditPage(webSafeText, sourceFileName, timestamp); File.WriteAllText(latestHtmlPath, html, Encoding.UTF8); string reportsIndexHtml = BuildReportsIndexPage(localArchiveRoot); File.WriteAllText(reportsIndexHtmlPath, reportsIndexHtml, Encoding.UTF8); EnsureGitIgnoreRules(gitIgnorePath); // One-time and repeat-safe Git cleanup: // remove any previously tracked large files from index before adding current trimmed files. CleanupGitTrackedLargeFiles(repoRootPath); // Also remove stray heavy files physically from repo root if they exist. CleanupPhysicalLargeFilesFromRepoRoot(repoRootPath); RunGit(repoRootPath, "add ."); RunGit(repoRootPath, $"commit -m \"TQGA auto publish {timestamp}\"", allowNoChanges: true); RunGit(repoRootPath, "push"); SaveRepoPath(repoRootPath); return new GitHubPagesPublishResult { RepoRootPath = repoRootPath, SourceReportPath = sourceReportPath, PublishedLatestTextPath = latestReportPath, PublishedIndexHtmlPath = latestHtmlPath, PublishedArchiveReportPath = archivedReportPath, PublishedReportsIndexPath = reportsIndexHtmlPath, PublicUrl = "https://arifpisonium.github.io/", PublicLatestTextUrl = "https://arifpisonium.github.io/FULL_REPORT_LATEST.txt", PublicReportsIndexUrl = "https://arifpisonium.github.io/reports.html" }; } public string? TryLoadSavedRepoPath() { string path = GetRepoPathConfigPath(); if (!File.Exists(path)) return null; string value = File.ReadAllText(path).Trim(); if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value)) return null; return Directory.Exists(value) ? value : null; } public void SaveRepoPath(string repoRootPath) { ArgumentException.ThrowIfNullOrWhiteSpace(repoRootPath); string path = GetRepoPathConfigPath(); File.WriteAllText(path, repoRootPath.Trim(), Encoding.UTF8); } private static void EnsureGitRepository(string repoRootPath) { string gitFolder = Path.Combine(repoRootPath, ".git"); if (!Directory.Exists(gitFolder)) throw new InvalidOperationException( $"Selected folder is not a Git repository. Missing .git folder at: {repoRootPath}"); } private static string GetRepoPathConfigPath() { string configDir = Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "Config"); Directory.CreateDirectory(configDir); return Path.Combine(configDir, RepoPathConfigFileName); } private static string GetLocalArchiveRoot(string repoRootPath) { string parent = Directory.GetParent(repoRootPath)?.FullName ?? repoRootPath; return Path.Combine(parent, "TQGA_LocalArchives"); } private static void CleanupGitTrackedLargeFiles(string repoRootPath) { RunGit(repoRootPath, "reset HEAD .", allowNoChanges: true); // Remove previously tracked heavy files from Git index only (keep working copy if still present). RunGit(repoRootPath, "rm --cached --ignore-unmatch FULL_REPORT_*.txt", allowNoChanges: true); RunGit(repoRootPath, "rm --cached --ignore-unmatch REPORT_ALL_31_*.txt", allowNoChanges: true); RunGit(repoRootPath, "rm -r --cached --ignore-unmatch reports", allowNoChanges: true); // Re-add current lightweight files later via git add . RunGit(repoRootPath, "rm --cached --ignore-unmatch FULL_REPORT_LATEST.txt", allowNoChanges: true); RunGit(repoRootPath, "rm --cached --ignore-unmatch index.html", allowNoChanges: true); RunGit(repoRootPath, "rm --cached --ignore-unmatch reports.html", allowNoChanges: true); } private static void CleanupPhysicalLargeFilesFromRepoRoot(string repoRootPath) { foreach (string file in Directory.GetFiles(repoRootPath, "FULL_REPORT_*.txt", SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly)) { TryDeleteFile(file); } foreach (string file in Directory.GetFiles(repoRootPath, "REPORT_ALL_31_*.txt", SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly)) { TryDeleteFile(file); } string reportsFolder = Path.Combine(repoRootPath, "reports"); if (Directory.Exists(reportsFolder)) { try { Directory.Delete(reportsFolder, recursive: true); } catch { // Keep non-fatal. Git index cleanup above is the critical part. } } } private static void TryDeleteFile(string filePath) { try { if (File.Exists(filePath)) File.Delete(filePath); } catch { // Non-fatal cleanup attempt. } } private static void RunGit(string workingDirectory, string arguments, bool allowNoChanges = false) { string gitExePath = ResolveGitExecutablePath(); using var process = new Process(); process.StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo { FileName = gitExePath, Arguments = arguments, WorkingDirectory = workingDirectory, RedirectStandardOutput = true, RedirectStandardError = true, UseShellExecute = false, CreateNoWindow = true }; try { process.Start(); } catch (Win32Exception ex) { throw new InvalidOperationException( "Git executable could not be started. " + "Install Git for Windows or add git.exe to PATH. " + $"Resolved git path attempt: {gitExePath}", ex); } string stdOut = process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd(); string stdErr = process.StandardError.ReadToEnd(); process.WaitForExit(); if (process.ExitCode != 0) { string combined = $"{stdOut}\n{stdErr}".Trim(); if (allowNoChanges && (combined.Contains("nothing to commit", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || combined.Contains("did not match any files", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || combined.Contains("fatal: pathspec", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))) { return; } throw new InvalidOperationException( $"Git command failed.\nExecutable: {gitExePath}\nCommand: git {arguments}\n\n{combined}"); } } private static string ResolveGitExecutablePath() { var candidates = new List(); string pathEnv = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable("PATH") ?? string.Empty; foreach (string rawPart in pathEnv.Split(';', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)) { try { string candidate = Path.Combine(rawPart, "git.exe"); candidates.Add(candidate); } catch { } } candidates.Add(@"C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe"); candidates.Add(@"C:\Program Files\Git\bin\git.exe"); candidates.Add(@"C:\Program Files (x86)\Git\cmd\git.exe"); candidates.Add(@"C:\Program Files (x86)\Git\bin\git.exe"); string localAppData = Environment.GetFolderPath(Environment.SpecialFolder.LocalApplicationData); if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(localAppData)) { candidates.Add(Path.Combine(localAppData, @"Programs\Git\cmd\git.exe")); candidates.Add(Path.Combine(localAppData, @"Programs\Git\bin\git.exe")); } string userProfile = Environment.GetFolderPath(Environment.SpecialFolder.UserProfile); if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(userProfile)) { candidates.Add(Path.Combine(userProfile, @"AppData\Local\Programs\Git\cmd\git.exe")); candidates.Add(Path.Combine(userProfile, @"AppData\Local\Programs\Git\bin\git.exe")); } foreach (string candidate in candidates.Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { if (File.Exists(candidate)) return candidate; } throw new FileNotFoundException( "git.exe was not found. Install Git for Windows and ensure git is available in PATH, " + "or installed in a standard location such as C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe."); } private static string TrimReportForWeb(string fullText, int maxChars) { if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(fullText)) return string.Empty; if (fullText.Length <= maxChars) return fullText; return fullText[..maxChars] + Environment.NewLine + Environment.NewLine + "==============================" + Environment.NewLine + "TRUNCATED FOR WEB VIEW" + Environment.NewLine + "Full report available locally" + Environment.NewLine + "==============================" + Environment.NewLine; } private static void EnsureGitIgnoreRules(string gitIgnorePath) { var requiredRules = new[] { "FULL_REPORT_*.txt", "REPORT_ALL_31_*.txt", "reports/", "TQGA_LocalArchives/" }; List existingLines = File.Exists(gitIgnorePath) ? File.ReadAllLines(gitIgnorePath).ToList() : new List(); bool changed = false; foreach (string rule in requiredRules) { if (!existingLines.Any(x => x.Trim().Equals(rule, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))) { existingLines.Add(rule); changed = true; } } if (changed) File.WriteAllLines(gitIgnorePath, existingLines, Encoding.UTF8); } private static string BuildHtmlAuditPage(string reportText, string fileName, string timestamp) { string escaped = System.Net.WebUtility.HtmlEncode(reportText ?? string.Empty); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" TQGA REPORT ALL 31"); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine("
TQGA REPORT ALL 31
"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine($"
Published (UTC): {DateTime.UtcNow:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}
"); sb.AppendLine($"
Build Stamp: {System.Net.WebUtility.HtmlEncode(timestamp)}
"); sb.AppendLine($"
Source File: {System.Net.WebUtility.HtmlEncode(fileName)}
"); sb.AppendLine("
Mode: Web-safe trimmed publish
"); sb.AppendLine("
Open raw text | Open reports index
"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine($" 
{escaped}
"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); return sb.ToString(); } private static string BuildReportsIndexPage(string localArchiveRoot) { Directory.CreateDirectory(localArchiveRoot); var files = Directory.GetFiles(localArchiveRoot, "*.txt", SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly) .Select(Path.GetFileName) .Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x)) .OrderByDescending(x => x, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase) .ToList(); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" TQGA Reports Index"); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine("

TQGA Reports Index

"); sb.AppendLine("

Open latest audit page | Open latest raw text

"); sb.AppendLine("

Full archive files are kept locally outside the GitHub Pages repo and are not pushed to GitHub.

"); sb.AppendLine("
    "); foreach (string? file in files) { if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(file)) continue; string safe = System.Net.WebUtility.HtmlEncode(file); sb.AppendLine($"
  • {safe}
    • "); } sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); return sb.ToString(); } } public sealed class GitHubPagesPublishResult { public string RepoRootPath { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string SourceReportPath { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string PublishedLatestTextPath { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string PublishedIndexHtmlPath { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string PublishedArchiveReportPath { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string PublishedReportsIndexPath { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string PublicUrl { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string PublicLatestTextUrl { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string PublicReportsIndexUrl { get; init; } = string.Empty; } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ G o o g l e D r i v e C o m b i n e d P u b l i s h S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 1 0 . 8 1 K B L I N E S : 2 5 1 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Diagnostics; using System.Text; using Google.Apis.Auth.OAuth2; using Google.Apis.Drive.v3; using Google.Apis.Services; using Google.Apis.Util.Store; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class GoogleDriveCombinedPublishService { private const string GoogleRootFolderName = "TQGA_GOOGLE"; private const string OAuthClientFileName = "oauth_client_secret.json"; private const string TokenStoreFolderName = "token_store"; // User-requested dedicated folder for the combined report only. private const string CombinedFolderIdOrLink = "https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1fnfG5-xfsk-rwaLL351r3ePScOh7p3S0"; private static readonly string[] Scopes = [ DriveService.Scope.Drive ]; public async Task PublishCombinedAsync(CancellationToken ct = default) { string reportDir = DataPaths.Reports; Directory.CreateDirectory(reportDir); string combinedFilePath = BuildCombinedReportFile(reportDir); string backupRoot = ResolveBackupRoot(reportDir); string googleRoot = Path.Combine(backupRoot, GoogleRootFolderName); Directory.CreateDirectory(googleRoot); string oauthClientPath = Path.Combine(googleRoot, OAuthClientFileName); string tokenStorePath = Path.Combine(googleRoot, TokenStoreFolderName); EnsureRequiredFileExists( oauthClientPath, "Google OAuth client file not found. Please create:\n" + oauthClientPath); string folderId = ParseFolderId(CombinedFolderIdOrLink); if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(folderId)) { throw new InvalidOperationException( "Combined Google Drive folder id is empty or invalid."); } DriveService service = await CreateDriveServiceAsync( oauthClientPath, tokenStorePath, "TQGA Google Combined Publish", ct); // Keep only the latest combined report in this dedicated folder. await DeleteExistingFilesInFolderAsync(service, folderId, ct); string uploadFileName = Path.GetFileName(combinedFilePath); var metadata = new Google.Apis.Drive.v3.Data.File { Name = uploadFileName, Parents = [folderId] }; await using FileStream stream = new(combinedFilePath, FileMode.Open, FileAccess.Read, FileShare.Read); var createRequest = service.Files.Create(metadata, stream, "text/plain"); createRequest.Fields = "id,name"; var uploaded = await createRequest.UploadAsync(ct); if (uploaded.Status != Google.Apis.Upload.UploadStatus.Completed) { throw new InvalidOperationException( $"Google Drive combined upload failed. Status: {uploaded.Status}"); } Google.Apis.Drive.v3.Data.File? created = createRequest.ResponseBody; if (created == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(created.Id)) { throw new InvalidOperationException( "Google Drive did not return a file id for the combined report."); } var permission = new Google.Apis.Drive.v3.Data.Permission { Type = "anyone", Role = "reader" }; var permissionRequest = service.Permissions.Create(permission, created.Id); permissionRequest.Fields = "id"; await permissionRequest.ExecuteAsync(ct); string folderLink = $"https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/{folderId}"; string viewLink = $"https://drive.google.com/file/d/{created.Id}/view"; string directLink = $"https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id={created.Id}"; TryOpenInBrowser(viewLink); return new GoogleDriveCombinedPublishResult { Success = true, ReportDirectory = reportDir, CombinedFilePath = combinedFilePath, CombinedFileName = uploadFileName, GoogleDriveFolderId = folderId, GoogleDriveFolderLink = folderLink, PublishedFileId = created.Id, PublicViewLink = viewLink, PublicDirectLink = directLink }; } private static string BuildCombinedReportFile(string reportDir) { var eligibleFiles = Directory .GetFiles(reportDir, "*.*", SearchOption.AllDirectories) .Where(IsEligibleReportFile) .OrderBy(x => x, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase) .ToList(); if (eligibleFiles.Count == 0) throw new InvalidOperationException("No eligible report files found to combine."); string combinedPath = Path.Combine( reportDir, $"REPORT_ALL_30_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("TQGA REPORT ALL 30"); sb.AppendLine("============================================================"); sb.AppendLine($"Generated UTC: {DateTime.UtcNow:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}"); sb.AppendLine($"Total Files Combined: {eligibleFiles.Count}"); sb.AppendLine(); foreach (string filePath in eligibleFiles) { string fileName = Path.GetFileName(filePath); string content = ReadAllTextSafe(filePath); sb.AppendLine("############################################################"); sb.AppendLine($"BEGIN FILE: {fileName}"); sb.AppendLine("############################################################"); sb.AppendLine(content.TrimEnd()); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("############################################################"); sb.AppendLine($"END FILE: {fileName}"); sb.AppendLine("############################################################"); sb.AppendLine(); } File.WriteAllText(combinedPath, sb.ToString(), Encoding.UTF8); return combinedPath; } private static bool IsEligibleReportFile(string path) { string fileName = Path.GetFileName(path); string ext = Path.GetExtension(path); if (!ext.Equals(".txt", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) && !ext.Equals(".csv", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { return false; } if (fileName.StartsWith("REPORT_ALL_", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) return false; if (fileName.Equals("latest_public_links.txt", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) return false; return true; } private static string ReadAllTextSafe(string path) { try { return File.ReadAllText(path, Encoding.UTF8); } catch { return File.ReadAllText(path); } } private static async Task CreateDriveServiceAsync( string oauthClientPath, string tokenStorePath, string applicationName, CancellationToken ct) { await using FileStream stream = new(oauthClientPath, FileMode.Open, FileAccess.Read, FileShare.Read); ClientSecrets secrets = GoogleClientSecrets.FromStream(stream).Secrets; UserCredential credential = await GoogleWebAuthorizationBroker.AuthorizeAsync( secrets, Scopes, "user", ct, new FileDataStore(tokenStorePath, true)); return new DriveService(new BaseClientService.Initializer { HttpClientInitializer = credential, ApplicationName = applicationName }); } private static async Task DeleteExistingFilesInFolderAsync( DriveService service, string folderId, CancellationToken ct) { string? pageToken = null; do { var listRequest = service.Files.List(); listRequest.Q = $"'{folderId}' in parents and trashed = false"; listRequest.Fields = "nextPageToken, files(id, name)"; listRequest.PageToken = pageToken; var page = await listRequest.ExecuteAsync(ct); foreach (Google.Apis.Drive.v3.Data.File file in page.Files ?? Enumerable.Empty()) { if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(file.Id)) continue; var deleteRequest = service.Files.Delete(file.Id); await deleteRequest.ExecuteAsync(ct); } pageToken = page.NextPageToken; } while (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(pageToken)); } private static string ParseFolderId(string value) { if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value)) return string.Empty; string trimmed = value.Trim(); if (!trimmed.Contains("http", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) return trimmed; const string marker = "/folders/"; int idx = trimmed.IndexOf(marker, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase); if (idx >= 0) { string tail = trimmed[(idx + marker.Length)..]; int end = tail.IndexOfAny(['?', '&', '/']); return end >= 0 ? tail[..end] : tail; } return trimmed; } private static string ResolveBackupRoot(string reportDir) { DirectoryInfo? current = new(reportDir); while (current != null) { if (current.Name.Equals("D DATA BACKUP", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) return current.FullName; current = current.Parent; } return Directory.GetParent(reportDir)?.FullName ?? reportDir; } private static void EnsureRequiredFileExists(string path, string message) { if (!File.Exists(path)) throw new FileNotFoundException(message, path); } private static void TryOpenInBrowser(string url) { Process.Start(new ProcessStartInfo { FileName = url, UseShellExecute = true }); } } public sealed class GoogleDriveCombinedPublishResult { public bool Success { get; init; } public string ReportDirectory { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string CombinedFilePath { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string CombinedFileName { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string GoogleDriveFolderId { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string GoogleDriveFolderLink { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string PublishedFileId { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string PublicViewLink { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string PublicDirectLink { get; init; } = string.Empty; } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ G o o g l e D r i v e C o m b i n e d S t a b l e P u b l i s h S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 8 . 9 7 K B L I N E S : 2 0 9 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Diagnostics; using System.Text; using Google.Apis.Auth.OAuth2; using Google.Apis.Drive.v3; using Google.Apis.Services; using Google.Apis.Util.Store; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class GoogleDriveCombinedStablePublishService { private const string GoogleRootFolderName = "TQGA_GOOGLE"; private const string OAuthClientFileName = "oauth_client_secret.json"; private const string TokenStoreFolderName = "token_store"; // Stable file ID provided by user. private const string StableGoogleDriveFileId = "1AD0USboa-n0TiHlx0ki-cwgEFmfd-Bws"; private static readonly string[] Scopes = [ DriveService.Scope.Drive ]; public async Task PublishStableAsync(CancellationToken ct = default) { string reportDir = DataPaths.Reports; Directory.CreateDirectory(reportDir); string combinedFilePath = BuildCombinedReportFile(reportDir); string backupRoot = ResolveBackupRoot(reportDir); string googleRoot = Path.Combine(backupRoot, GoogleRootFolderName); Directory.CreateDirectory(googleRoot); string oauthClientPath = Path.Combine(googleRoot, OAuthClientFileName); string tokenStorePath = Path.Combine(googleRoot, TokenStoreFolderName); EnsureRequiredFileExists( oauthClientPath, "Google OAuth client file not found. Please create:\n" + oauthClientPath); DriveService service = await CreateDriveServiceAsync( oauthClientPath, tokenStorePath, "TQGA Google Stable Combined Publish", ct); var existing = await service.Files.Get(StableGoogleDriveFileId).ExecuteAsync(ct); if (existing == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(existing.Id)) { throw new InvalidOperationException( $"Google Drive stable file not found for id: {StableGoogleDriveFileId}"); } string uploadFileName = Path.GetFileName(combinedFilePath); var metadata = new Google.Apis.Drive.v3.Data.File { Name = uploadFileName, MimeType = "text/plain" }; await using FileStream stream = new(combinedFilePath, FileMode.Open, FileAccess.Read, FileShare.Read); var updateRequest = service.Files.Update(metadata, StableGoogleDriveFileId, stream, "text/plain"); updateRequest.Fields = "id,name,webViewLink,webContentLink"; var uploaded = await updateRequest.UploadAsync(ct); if (uploaded.Status != Google.Apis.Upload.UploadStatus.Completed) { throw new InvalidOperationException( $"Google Drive stable combined update failed. Status: {uploaded.Status}"); } Google.Apis.Drive.v3.Data.File? updated = updateRequest.ResponseBody; if (updated == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(updated.Id)) { throw new InvalidOperationException( "Google Drive did not return a valid file after stable combined update."); } var permission = new Google.Apis.Drive.v3.Data.Permission { Type = "anyone", Role = "reader" }; try { var permissionRequest = service.Permissions.Create(permission, updated.Id); permissionRequest.Fields = "id"; await permissionRequest.ExecuteAsync(ct); } catch { // Ignore duplicate/public permission creation issues. } string publicViewLink = $"https://drive.google.com/file/d/{updated.Id}/view"; string publicDirectLink = $"https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id={updated.Id}"; TryOpenInBrowser(publicViewLink); return new GoogleDriveCombinedStablePublishResult { Success = true, ReportDirectory = reportDir, CombinedFilePath = combinedFilePath, CombinedFileName = uploadFileName, StableFileId = updated.Id, PublicViewLink = publicViewLink, PublicDirectLink = publicDirectLink }; } private static string BuildCombinedReportFile(string reportDir) { List eligibleFiles = Directory .GetFiles(reportDir, "*.*", SearchOption.AllDirectories) .Where(IsEligibleReportFile) .OrderBy(x => x, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase) .ToList(); if (eligibleFiles.Count == 0) throw new InvalidOperationException("No eligible report files found to combine."); string combinedPath = Path.Combine( reportDir, $"REPORT_ALL_30_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("TQGA REPORT ALL 30"); sb.AppendLine("============================================================"); sb.AppendLine($"Generated UTC: {DateTime.UtcNow:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}"); sb.AppendLine($"Total Files Combined: {eligibleFiles.Count}"); sb.AppendLine(); foreach (string filePath in eligibleFiles) { string fileName = Path.GetFileName(filePath); string content = ReadAllTextSafe(filePath); sb.AppendLine("############################################################"); sb.AppendLine($"BEGIN FILE: {fileName}"); sb.AppendLine("############################################################"); sb.AppendLine(content.TrimEnd()); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("############################################################"); sb.AppendLine($"END FILE: {fileName}"); sb.AppendLine("############################################################"); sb.AppendLine(); } File.WriteAllText(combinedPath, sb.ToString(), Encoding.UTF8); return combinedPath; } private static bool IsEligibleReportFile(string path) { string fileName = Path.GetFileName(path); string ext = Path.GetExtension(path); if (!ext.Equals(".txt", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) && !ext.Equals(".csv", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { return false; } if (fileName.StartsWith("REPORT_ALL_", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) return false; if (fileName.Equals("latest_public_links.txt", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) return false; return true; } private static string ReadAllTextSafe(string path) { try { return File.ReadAllText(path, Encoding.UTF8); } catch { return File.ReadAllText(path); } } private static async Task CreateDriveServiceAsync( string oauthClientPath, string tokenStorePath, string applicationName, CancellationToken ct) { await using FileStream stream = new(oauthClientPath, FileMode.Open, FileAccess.Read, FileShare.Read); ClientSecrets secrets = GoogleClientSecrets.FromStream(stream).Secrets; UserCredential credential = await GoogleWebAuthorizationBroker.AuthorizeAsync( secrets, Scopes, "user", ct, new FileDataStore(tokenStorePath, true)); return new DriveService(new BaseClientService.Initializer { HttpClientInitializer = credential, ApplicationName = applicationName }); } private static string ResolveBackupRoot(string reportDir) { DirectoryInfo? current = new(reportDir); while (current != null) { if (current.Name.Equals("D DATA BACKUP", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) return current.FullName; current = current.Parent; } return Directory.GetParent(reportDir)?.FullName ?? reportDir; } private static void EnsureRequiredFileExists(string path, string message) { if (!File.Exists(path)) throw new FileNotFoundException(message, path); } private static void TryOpenInBrowser(string url) { Process.Start(new ProcessStartInfo { FileName = url, UseShellExecute = true }); } } public sealed class GoogleDriveCombinedStablePublishResult { public bool Success { get; init; } public string ReportDirectory { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string CombinedFilePath { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string CombinedFileName { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string StableFileId { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string PublicViewLink { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string PublicDirectLink { get; init; } = string.Empty; } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A .
