A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ G o o g l e D r i v e R e p o r t P u b l i s h S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 1 2 . 5 6 K B L I N E S : 2 9 1 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Diagnostics; using System.Text; using System.Text.Json; using Google.Apis.Auth.OAuth2; using Google.Apis.Drive.v3; using Google.Apis.Services; using Google.Apis.Util.Store; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class GoogleDriveReportPublishService { private const string GoogleRootFolderName = "TQGA_GOOGLE"; private const string OAuthClientFileName = "oauth_client_secret.json"; private const string PublishSettingsFileName = "publish_settings.json"; private const string TokenStoreFolderName = "token_store"; private const string LinksOutputFileName = "latest_public_links.txt"; private static readonly string[] Scopes = [ DriveService.Scope.Drive ]; private static readonly JsonSerializerOptions SettingsJsonOptions = new() { PropertyNameCaseInsensitive = true }; public async Task PublishAsync(CancellationToken ct = default) { string reportDir = DataPaths.Reports; Directory.CreateDirectory(reportDir); string backupRoot = ResolveBackupRoot(reportDir); string googleRoot = Path.Combine(backupRoot, GoogleRootFolderName); Directory.CreateDirectory(googleRoot); string oauthClientPath = Path.Combine(googleRoot, OAuthClientFileName); string settingsPath = Path.Combine(googleRoot, PublishSettingsFileName); string tokenStorePath = Path.Combine(googleRoot, TokenStoreFolderName); string linksOutputPath = Path.Combine(googleRoot, LinksOutputFileName); EnsureRequiredFileExists( oauthClientPath, "Google OAuth client file not found. Please create:\n" + oauthClientPath); EnsureRequiredFileExists( settingsPath, "Google publish settings file not found. Please create:\n" + settingsPath); GoogleDrivePublishSettings settings = LoadSettings(settingsPath); string folderId = ParseFolderId(settings.GoogleDriveFolderIdOrLink); if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(folderId)) { throw new InvalidOperationException( "GoogleDriveFolderIdOrLink is empty or invalid in publish_settings.json."); } DriveService service = await CreateDriveServiceAsync( oauthClientPath, tokenStorePath, settings.ApplicationName, ct); if (settings.DeleteExistingFilesInFolderBeforeUpload) await DeleteExistingFilesInFolderAsync(service, folderId, ct); List localFiles = Directory .GetFiles(reportDir, "*.*", SearchOption.AllDirectories) .OrderBy(x => x, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase) .ToList(); List publishedFiles = []; foreach (string localPath in localFiles) { ct.ThrowIfCancellationRequested(); string relativePath = Path.GetRelativePath(reportDir, localPath); string driveName = BuildDriveSafeName(relativePath); string mimeType = GetMimeType(localPath); var metadata = new Google.Apis.Drive.v3.Data.File { Name = driveName, Parents = [folderId] }; await using FileStream stream = new(localPath, FileMode.Open, FileAccess.Read, FileShare.Read); var createRequest = service.Files.Create(metadata, stream, mimeType); createRequest.Fields = "id,name,webViewLink,webContentLink"; var uploaded = await createRequest.UploadAsync(ct); if (uploaded.Status != Google.Apis.Upload.UploadStatus.Completed) { throw new InvalidOperationException( $"Google Drive upload failed for file: {relativePath}. Status: {uploaded.Status}"); } Google.Apis.Drive.v3.Data.File? created = createRequest.ResponseBody; if (created == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(created.Id)) { throw new InvalidOperationException( $"Google Drive did not return a file id for: {relativePath}"); } if (settings.MakeAnyoneWithLinkViewer) { var permission = new Google.Apis.Drive.v3.Data.Permission { Type = "anyone", Role = "reader" }; var permissionRequest = service.Permissions.Create(permission, created.Id); permissionRequest.Fields = "id"; await permissionRequest.ExecuteAsync(ct); } string publicLink = $"https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id={created.Id}"; publishedFiles.Add(new GoogleDrivePublishedFile { LocalPath = localPath, RelativePath = relativePath, DriveFileId = created.Id, DriveFileName = created.Name ?? driveName, PublicLink = publicLink }); } string folderPublicLink = $"https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/{folderId}"; string linksText = BuildLinksText(folderPublicLink, publishedFiles); File.WriteAllText(linksOutputPath, linksText, Encoding.UTF8); TryOpenInBrowser(folderPublicLink); return new GoogleDrivePublishResult { Success = true, ReportDirectory = reportDir, GoogleConfigRoot = googleRoot, GoogleDriveFolderId = folderId, GoogleDriveFolderLink = folderPublicLink, PublishedCount = publishedFiles.Count, LinksOutputPath = linksOutputPath, FullLinksText = linksText, PublishedFiles = publishedFiles }; } private static async Task CreateDriveServiceAsync( string oauthClientPath, string tokenStorePath, string? applicationName, CancellationToken ct) { await using FileStream stream = new(oauthClientPath, FileMode.Open, FileAccess.Read, FileShare.Read); ClientSecrets secrets = GoogleClientSecrets.FromStream(stream).Secrets; UserCredential credential = await GoogleWebAuthorizationBroker.AuthorizeAsync( secrets, Scopes, "user", ct, new FileDataStore(tokenStorePath, true)); return new DriveService(new BaseClientService.Initializer { HttpClientInitializer = credential, ApplicationName = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(applicationName) ? "TQGA Google Publish" : applicationName }); } private static async Task DeleteExistingFilesInFolderAsync( DriveService service, string folderId, CancellationToken ct) { string? pageToken = null; do { var listRequest = service.Files.List(); listRequest.Q = $"'{folderId}' in parents and trashed = false"; listRequest.Fields = "nextPageToken, files(id, name)"; listRequest.PageToken = pageToken; var page = await listRequest.ExecuteAsync(ct); foreach (Google.Apis.Drive.v3.Data.File file in page.Files ?? Enumerable.Empty()) { if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(file.Id)) continue; var deleteRequest = service.Files.Delete(file.Id); await deleteRequest.ExecuteAsync(ct); } pageToken = page.NextPageToken; } while (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(pageToken)); } private static GoogleDrivePublishSettings LoadSettings(string settingsPath) { string json = File.ReadAllText(settingsPath, Encoding.UTF8); GoogleDrivePublishSettings? settings = JsonSerializer.Deserialize( json, SettingsJsonOptions); if (settings == null) throw new InvalidOperationException("Could not parse publish_settings.json."); return settings; } private static string ParseFolderId(string value) { if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value)) return string.Empty; string trimmed = value.Trim(); if (!trimmed.Contains("http", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) return trimmed; const string marker = "/folders/"; int idx = trimmed.IndexOf(marker, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase); if (idx >= 0) { string tail = trimmed[(idx + marker.Length)..]; int end = tail.IndexOfAny(['?', '&', '/']); return end >= 0 ? tail[..end] : tail; } return trimmed; } private static string ResolveBackupRoot(string reportDir) { DirectoryInfo? current = new(reportDir); while (current != null) { if (current.Name.Equals("D DATA BACKUP", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) return current.FullName; current = current.Parent; } return Directory.GetParent(reportDir)?.FullName ?? reportDir; } private static void EnsureRequiredFileExists(string path, string message) { if (!File.Exists(path)) throw new FileNotFoundException(message, path); } private static string BuildDriveSafeName(string relativePath) { return relativePath .Replace('\\', '_') .Replace('/', '_') .Replace(':', '_'); } private static string GetMimeType(string path) { string ext = Path.GetExtension(path).ToLowerInvariant(); return ext switch { ".txt" => "text/plain", ".csv" => "text/csv", ".json" => "application/json", ".html" => "text/html", ".pdf" => "application/pdf", ".zip" => "application/zip", ".png" => "image/png", ".jpg" or ".jpeg" => "image/jpeg", ".svg" => "image/svg+xml", _ => "application/octet-stream" }; } private static string BuildLinksText( string folderPublicLink, IReadOnlyList files) { var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("TQGA GOOGLE DRIVE PUBLIC LINKS"); sb.AppendLine("================================"); sb.AppendLine($"Published Files: {files.Count}"); sb.AppendLine($"Folder Link: {folderPublicLink}"); sb.AppendLine(); foreach (GoogleDrivePublishedFile file in files.OrderBy(x => x.RelativePath, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { sb.AppendLine(file.RelativePath); sb.AppendLine(file.PublicLink); sb.AppendLine(); } return sb.ToString().TrimEnd(); } private static void TryOpenInBrowser(string url) { Process.Start(new ProcessStartInfo { FileName = url, UseShellExecute = true }); } } public sealed class GoogleDrivePublishResult { public bool Success { get; init; } public string ReportDirectory { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string GoogleConfigRoot { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string GoogleDriveFolderId { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string GoogleDriveFolderLink { get; init; } = string.Empty; public int PublishedCount { get; init; } public string LinksOutputPath { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string FullLinksText { get; init; } = string.Empty; public IReadOnlyList PublishedFiles { get; init; } = Array.Empty(); } public sealed class GoogleDrivePublishedFile { public string LocalPath { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string RelativePath { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string DriveFileId { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string DriveFileName { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string PublicLink { get; init; } = string.Empty; } public sealed class GoogleDrivePublishSettings { public string GoogleDriveFolderIdOrLink { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string ApplicationName { get; init; } = "TQGA Google Publish"; public bool MakeAnyoneWithLinkViewer { get; init; } = true; public bool DeleteExistingFilesInFolderBeforeUpload { get; init; } = false; } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ L o c a l S t a t i c S i t e H o s t . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 6 . 9 6 K B L I N E S : 2 0 2 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Net; using System.Text; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class LocalStaticSiteHost : IDisposable { private readonly object _sync = new(); private HttpListener? _listener; private CancellationTokenSource? _cts; private Task? _listenLoopTask; private string _siteRoot = string.Empty; private int _port; public int Port => _port; public bool IsRunning => _listener != null && _listener.IsListening; public string Start(string siteRoot, int preferredPort = 8787) { if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(siteRoot)) throw new ArgumentException("Site root is required.", nameof(siteRoot)); if (!Directory.Exists(siteRoot)) throw new DirectoryNotFoundException($"Site root not found: {siteRoot}"); lock (_sync) { if (IsRunning && string.Equals(_siteRoot, siteRoot, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) return BuildBaseUrl(_port); StopInternal(); _siteRoot = siteRoot; _port = FindAvailablePort(preferredPort); _listener = new HttpListener(); _listener.Prefixes.Add($"http://localhost:{_port}/"); _listener.Start(); _cts = new CancellationTokenSource(); _listenLoopTask = Task.Run(() => ListenLoopAsync(_cts.Token)); return BuildBaseUrl(_port); } } public void Stop() { lock (_sync) { StopInternal(); } } private void StopInternal() { try { _cts?.Cancel(); } catch { } try { if (_listener != null && _listener.IsListening) _listener.Stop(); } catch { } try { _listener?.Close(); } catch { } _listener = null; _cts?.Dispose(); _cts = null; _listenLoopTask = null; _siteRoot = string.Empty; _port = 0; } private async Task ListenLoopAsync(CancellationToken ct) { while (!ct.IsCancellationRequested && _listener != null) { HttpListenerContext? context = null; try { context = await _listener.GetContextAsync(); } catch { if (ct.IsCancellationRequested) break; if (_listener == null || !_listener.IsListening) break; } if (context == null) continue; _ = Task.Run(() => HandleRequestAsync(context, ct), ct); } } private async Task HandleRequestAsync(HttpListenerContext context, CancellationToken ct) { try { string relativePath = context.Request.Url?.AbsolutePath ?? "/"; if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(relativePath) || relativePath == "/") relativePath = "/index.html"; relativePath = Uri.UnescapeDataString(relativePath.TrimStart('/')); relativePath = relativePath.Replace('/', Path.DirectorySeparatorChar); string fullPath = Path.GetFullPath(Path.Combine(_siteRoot, relativePath)); string siteRootFull = Path.GetFullPath(_siteRoot); if (!fullPath.StartsWith(siteRootFull, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { context.Response.StatusCode = 403; await WriteTextAsync(context.Response, "Forbidden", "text/plain", ct); return; } if (Directory.Exists(fullPath)) { string indexPath = Path.Combine(fullPath, "index.html"); if (File.Exists(indexPath)) fullPath = indexPath; } if (!File.Exists(fullPath)) { context.Response.StatusCode = 404; await WriteTextAsync(context.Response, "Not Found", "text/plain", ct); return; } byte[] bytes = await File.ReadAllBytesAsync(fullPath, ct); context.Response.StatusCode = 200; context.Response.ContentType = GetContentType(fullPath); context.Response.ContentLength64 = bytes.LongLength; context.Response.AddHeader("Cache-Control", "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate"); await context.Response.OutputStream.WriteAsync(bytes, 0, bytes.Length, ct); context.Response.OutputStream.Close(); } catch { try { context.Response.StatusCode = 500; await WriteTextAsync(context.Response, "Internal Server Error", "text/plain", ct); } catch { } } } private static async Task WriteTextAsync( HttpListenerResponse response, string text, string contentType, CancellationToken ct) { byte[] bytes = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(text); response.ContentType = contentType; response.ContentLength64 = bytes.LongLength; await response.OutputStream.WriteAsync(bytes, 0, bytes.Length, ct); response.OutputStream.Close(); } private static int FindAvailablePort(int preferredPort) { for (int port = preferredPort; port < preferredPort + 50; port++) { try { using var listener = new HttpListener(); listener.Prefixes.Add($"http://localhost:{port}/"); listener.Start(); listener.Stop(); return port; } catch { // try next port } } throw new InvalidOperationException("Could not find an available localhost port."); } private static string BuildBaseUrl(int port) { return $"http://localhost:{port}/"; } private static string GetContentType(string path) { string ext = Path.GetExtension(path).ToLowerInvariant(); return ext switch { ".html" => "text/html; charset=utf-8", ".txt" => "text/plain; charset=utf-8", ".csv" => "text/csv; charset=utf-8", ".json" => "application/json; charset=utf-8", ".css" => "text/css; charset=utf-8", ".js" => "application/javascript; charset=utf-8", ".png" => "image/png", ".jpg" or ".jpeg" => "image/jpeg", ".webp" => "image/webp", ".svg" => "image/svg+xml", ".pdf" => "application/pdf", ".zip" => "application/zip", _ => "application/octet-stream" }; } public void Dispose() { Stop(); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ M i n i R e p o r t S a m p l i n g S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 6 8 K B L I N E S : 2 1 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Globalization; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class MiniReportSamplingService { public IEnumerable<(DateTime time, decimal value)> DownSample( IReadOnlyDictionary source, TimeSpan interval) { if (source == null || source.Count == 0) yield break; var ordered = source.OrderBy(x => x.Key).ToList(); var nextCut = ordered[0].Key; foreach (var point in ordered) { if (point.Key < nextCut) continue; yield return (point.Key, point.Value); nextCut = point.Key + interval; } } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ P o r t f o l i o D r a w d o w n R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 4 . 0 3 K B L I N E S : 9 3 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Globalization; using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class PortfolioDrawdownReportService { private readonly MiniReportSamplingService _mini; public PortfolioDrawdownReportService(MiniReportSamplingService mini) { _mini = mini; } public void Generate(IReadOnlyDictionary timeline) { Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); var ts = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"); var fullPath = Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"REPORT_10_DRAWDOWN_{ts}.csv"); var miniPath = Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"REPORT_10_MINI_DRAWDOWN_{ts}.csv"); var ordered = timeline? .OrderBy(x => x.Key) .ToList() ?? new List>(); if (ordered.Count == 0) { File.WriteAllText( fullPath, "REPORT 10 — PORTFOLIO DRAWDOWN ENGINE" + Environment.NewLine + "=====================================" + Environment.NewLine + "NO DATA: PortfolioEquityTimeline is empty." + Environment.NewLine); File.WriteAllText( miniPath, "REPORT 10 — MINI DRAWDOWN" + Environment.NewLine + "===================================" + Environment.NewLine + "NO DATA: PortfolioEquityTimeline is empty." + Environment.NewLine); return; } decimal peak = decimal.MinValue; decimal maxDd = 0m; DateTime? ddStart = null; TimeSpan longestDd = TimeSpan.Zero; var rows = new List<(DateTime time, decimal equity, decimal dd)>(); foreach (var p in ordered) { var equity = p.Value; if (equity > peak) { peak = equity; if (ddStart != null) { var duration = p.Key - ddStart.Value; if (duration > longestDd) longestDd = duration; ddStart = null; } } var dd = peak == 0m ? 0m : (equity - peak) / peak * 100m; if (dd < 0m && ddStart == null) ddStart = p.Key; if (dd < maxDd) maxDd = dd; rows.Add((p.Key, equity, dd)); } var currentEquity = ordered[^1].Value; var currentDd = peak == 0m ? 0m : (currentEquity - peak) / peak * 100m; var full = new StringBuilder(); full.AppendLine("REPORT 10 — PORTFOLIO DRAWDOWN ENGINE"); full.AppendLine("====================================="); full.AppendLine(); full.AppendLine($"Peak Equity : {peak:F2}"); full.AppendLine($"Current Equity : {currentEquity:F2}"); full.AppendLine($"Current Drawdown : {currentDd:F2} %"); full.AppendLine($"Max Drawdown : {maxDd:F2} %"); full.AppendLine($"Longest Drawdown : {longestDd.TotalDays:F1} days"); full.AppendLine(); full.AppendLine("Time,Equity,Drawdown%"); foreach (var r in rows) full.AppendLine($"{r.time:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm},{r.equity:F2},{r.dd:F2}"); File.WriteAllText(fullPath, full.ToString()); var miniTimeline = rows.ToDictionary(x => x.time, x => x.dd); var mini = _mini.DownSample(miniTimeline, TimeSpan.FromDays(7)); var miniSb = new StringBuilder(); miniSb.AppendLine("REPORT 10 — MINI DRAWDOWN"); miniSb.AppendLine("==================================="); miniSb.AppendLine("Time,Drawdown%"); foreach (var p in mini) miniSb.AppendLine($"{p.time:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm},{p.value.ToString("F2", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)}"); File.WriteAllText(miniPath, miniSb.ToString()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ P o r t f o l i o E q u i t y R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 2 . 5 5 K B L I N E S : 5 7 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Globalization; using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class PortfolioEquityReportService { private readonly MiniReportSamplingService _mini; public PortfolioEquityReportService(MiniReportSamplingService mini) { _mini = mini; } public void Generate(IReadOnlyDictionary timeline) { Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); var ts = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"); var fullPath = Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"REPORT_07_PORTFOLIO_EQUITY_{ts}.csv"); var miniPath = Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"REPORT_07_MINI_EQUITY_{ts}.csv"); var ordered = timeline? .OrderBy(x => x.Key) .ToList() ?? new List>(); if (ordered.Count == 0) { File.WriteAllText( fullPath, "REPORT 07 — PORTFOLIO EQUITY CURVE" + Environment.NewLine + "===================================" + Environment.NewLine + "NO DATA: PortfolioEquityTimeline is empty." + Environment.NewLine); File.WriteAllText( miniPath, "REPORT 07 — MINI EQUITY CURVE" + Environment.NewLine + "===================================" + Environment.NewLine + "NO DATA: PortfolioEquityTimeline is empty." + Environment.NewLine); return; } var full = new StringBuilder(); full.AppendLine("REPORT 07 — PORTFOLIO EQUITY CURVE"); full.AppendLine("==================================="); full.AppendLine("Time,Equity"); foreach (var p in ordered) full.AppendLine($"{p.Key:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm},{p.Value.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)}"); File.WriteAllText(fullPath, full.ToString()); var mini = _mini.DownSample( ordered.ToDictionary(x => x.Key, x => x.Value), TimeSpan.FromDays(7)); var miniSb = new StringBuilder(); miniSb.AppendLine("REPORT 07 — MINI EQUITY CURVE"); miniSb.AppendLine("==================================="); miniSb.AppendLine("Time,Equity"); foreach (var p in mini) miniSb.AppendLine($"{p.time:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm},{p.value.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)}"); File.WriteAllText(miniPath, miniSb.ToString()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ Q u i c k A u d i t R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 2 . 7 3 K B L I N E S : 6 9 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Accounting; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class QuickAuditReportService { public string Build( TradeLedger ledger, EquityCurve equity) { var points = equity.Points; if (points.Count == 0) return "NO DATA"; var start = points.First().Value; var end = points.Last().Value; var pnl = end - start; var ret = start == 0 ? 0 : pnl / start * 100m; var maxDd = CalculateMaxDrawdown(points); var trades = ledger.Trades.Where(t => t.IsClosed).ToList(); var wins = trades.Count(t => t.RealizedPnL > 0); var losses = trades.Count(t => t.RealizedPnL <= 0); var winRate = trades.Count == 0 ? 0 : (decimal)wins / trades.Count * 100m; var avgWin = trades.Where(t => t.RealizedPnL > 0) .Select(t => t.RealizedPnL) .DefaultIfEmpty(0) .Average(); var avgLoss = trades.Where(t => t.RealizedPnL <= 0) .Select(t => t.RealizedPnL) .DefaultIfEmpty(0) .Average(); var pf = avgLoss == 0 ? 0 : Math.Abs(avgWin / avgLoss); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("QUICK AUDIT"); sb.AppendLine("==========="); sb.AppendLine($"Start Equity : {start:F2}"); sb.AppendLine($"Final Equity : {end:F2}"); sb.AppendLine($"Net PnL : {pnl:F2}"); sb.AppendLine($"Return % : {ret:F2}"); sb.AppendLine($"Max DD % : {maxDd:F2}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine($"Trades : {trades.Count}"); sb.AppendLine($"Winrate % : {winRate:F2}"); sb.AppendLine($"ProfitFactor : {pf:F2}"); sb.AppendLine($"Avg Win : {avgWin:F2}"); sb.AppendLine($"Avg Loss : {avgLoss:F2}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine($"Timeline Pts : {points.Count}"); sb.AppendLine($"Start Time : {points.First().Time}"); sb.AppendLine($"End Time : {points.Last().Time}"); return sb.ToString(); } private static decimal CalculateMaxDrawdown( IReadOnlyList<(DateTime Time, decimal Value)> pts) { decimal peak = decimal.MinValue; decimal maxDd = 0; foreach (var p in pts) { if (p.Value > peak) peak = p.Value; if (peak == 0) continue; var dd = (peak - p.Value) / peak * 100m; if (dd > maxDd) maxDd = dd; } return maxDd; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ R e c o n c i l i a t i o n R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 9 . 2 2 K B L I N E S : 1 6 4 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Backtesting; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class ReconciliationReportService { public void Generate(PortfolioBacktestResult result) { ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(result); decimal sumStrategyPnL = result.StrategyPnL.Values.Sum(); decimal sumSymbolPnL = result.SymbolPnL.Values.Sum(); decimal sumSymbolTimeframePnL = result.SymbolTimeframePnL.Values.Sum(); decimal sumStrategySymbolTimeframePnL = result.StrategySymbolTimeframePnL.Values.Sum(); var orderedEquity = result.PortfolioEquityTimeline .OrderBy(x => x.Key) .ToList(); decimal equityStart = orderedEquity.Count == 0 ? 0m : orderedEquity.First().Value; decimal equityEnd = orderedEquity.Count == 0 ? 0m : orderedEquity.Last().Value; decimal equityDelta = equityEnd - equityStart; decimal strategyVsEquityResidual = sumStrategyPnL - equityDelta; decimal symbolVsEquityResidual = sumSymbolPnL - equityDelta; decimal symbolTfVsEquityResidual = sumSymbolTimeframePnL - equityDelta; decimal strategySymbolTfVsEquityResidual = sumStrategySymbolTimeframePnL - equityDelta; decimal strategyVsSymbolResidual = sumStrategyPnL - sumSymbolPnL; decimal strategyVsSymbolTfResidual = sumStrategyPnL - sumSymbolTimeframePnL; decimal symbolVsSymbolTfResidual = sumSymbolPnL - sumSymbolTimeframePnL; decimal strategyVsStrategySymbolTfResidual = sumStrategyPnL - sumStrategySymbolTimeframePnL; bool strategyVsEquityPass = IsWithinTolerance(strategyVsEquityResidual); bool symbolVsEquityPass = IsWithinTolerance(symbolVsEquityResidual); bool symbolTfVsEquityPass = IsWithinTolerance(symbolTfVsEquityResidual); bool strategySymbolTfVsEquityPass = IsWithinTolerance(strategySymbolTfVsEquityResidual); bool strategyVsSymbolPass = IsWithinTolerance(strategyVsSymbolResidual); bool strategyVsSymbolTfPass = IsWithinTolerance(strategyVsSymbolTfResidual); bool symbolVsSymbolTfPass = IsWithinTolerance(symbolVsSymbolTfResidual); bool strategyVsStrategySymbolTfPass = IsWithinTolerance(strategyVsStrategySymbolTfResidual); int selectedMarketCount = result.SelectedMarkets.Count; int strategyCount = result.StrategyPnL.Count; int symbolCount = result.SymbolPnL.Count; int symbolTfCount = result.SymbolTimeframePnL.Count; int strategySymbolTfCount = result.StrategySymbolTimeframePnL.Count; int equityPointCount = result.PortfolioEquityTimeline.Count; var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("REPORT 31 — RECONCILIATION AUDIT"); sb.AppendLine("================================"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine($"Generated (UTC): {DateTime.UtcNow:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("SECTION A — BASIS TOTALS"); sb.AppendLine("------------------------"); sb.AppendLine($"Sum Strategy PnL : {sumStrategyPnL:F2}"); sb.AppendLine($"Sum Symbol PnL : {sumSymbolPnL:F2}"); sb.AppendLine($"Sum Symbol×Timeframe PnL : {sumSymbolTimeframePnL:F2}"); sb.AppendLine($"Sum Strategy×Symbol×TF PnL : {sumStrategySymbolTimeframePnL:F2}"); sb.AppendLine($"Portfolio Equity Start : {equityStart:F2}"); sb.AppendLine($"Portfolio Equity End : {equityEnd:F2}"); sb.AppendLine($"Portfolio Equity Delta : {equityDelta:F2}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("SECTION B — RESIDUAL CHECKS"); sb.AppendLine("---------------------------"); AppendResidual(sb, "Strategy vs Equity Delta", strategyVsEquityResidual, strategyVsEquityPass); AppendResidual(sb, "Symbol vs Equity Delta", symbolVsEquityResidual, symbolVsEquityPass); AppendResidual(sb, "Symbol×TF vs Equity Delta", symbolTfVsEquityResidual, symbolTfVsEquityPass); AppendResidual(sb, "Strategy×Symbol×TF vs Equity Delta", strategySymbolTfVsEquityResidual, strategySymbolTfVsEquityPass); AppendResidual(sb, "Strategy vs Symbol", strategyVsSymbolResidual, strategyVsSymbolPass); AppendResidual(sb, "Strategy vs Symbol×TF", strategyVsSymbolTfResidual, strategyVsSymbolTfPass); AppendResidual(sb, "Symbol vs Symbol×TF", symbolVsSymbolTfResidual, symbolVsSymbolTfPass); AppendResidual(sb, "Strategy vs Strategy×Symbol×TF", strategyVsStrategySymbolTfResidual, strategyVsStrategySymbolTfPass); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("SECTION C — COVERAGE COUNTS"); sb.AppendLine("---------------------------"); sb.AppendLine($"Selected Markets : {selectedMarketCount}"); sb.AppendLine($"Strategies Reported : {strategyCount}"); sb.AppendLine($"Symbols Reported : {symbolCount}"); sb.AppendLine($"Symbol×TF Keys : {symbolTfCount}"); sb.AppendLine($"Strategy×Symbol×TF Keys : {strategySymbolTfCount}"); sb.AppendLine($"Equity Timeline Points : {equityPointCount}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("SECTION D — DIAGNOSTIC FLAGS"); sb.AppendLine("----------------------------"); bool anyFailure = !strategyVsEquityPass || !symbolVsEquityPass || !symbolTfVsEquityPass || !strategySymbolTfVsEquityPass || !strategyVsSymbolPass || !strategyVsSymbolTfPass || !symbolVsSymbolTfPass || !strategyVsStrategySymbolTfPass; if (!anyFailure) { sb.AppendLine("PASS: All major reconciliation checks are within tolerance."); } else { sb.AppendLine("FAIL: One or more reconciliation checks are outside tolerance."); if (!strategyVsEquityPass) sb.AppendLine("ALERT: Strategy totals do not reconcile to portfolio equity delta."); if (!symbolVsEquityPass) sb.AppendLine("ALERT: Symbol totals do not reconcile to portfolio equity delta."); if (!symbolTfVsEquityPass) sb.AppendLine("ALERT: Symbol×timeframe totals do not reconcile to portfolio equity delta."); if (!strategySymbolTfVsEquityPass) sb.AppendLine("ALERT: Strategy×symbol×timeframe totals do not reconcile to portfolio equity delta."); if (!strategyVsSymbolPass) sb.AppendLine("ALERT: Strategy totals diverge from symbol totals."); if (!strategyVsSymbolTfPass) sb.AppendLine("ALERT: Strategy totals diverge from symbol×timeframe totals."); if (!symbolVsSymbolTfPass) sb.AppendLine("ALERT: Symbol totals diverge from symbol×timeframe totals."); if (!strategyVsStrategySymbolTfPass) sb.AppendLine("ALERT: Strategy totals diverge from strategy×symbol×timeframe totals."); } sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("SECTION E — TOP CONTRIBUTORS"); sb.AppendLine("----------------------------"); sb.AppendLine("Top Strategies:"); foreach (var kv in result.StrategyPnL .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value) .Take(10)) { sb.AppendLine($"Strategy {kv.Key:00} : {kv.Value:F2}"); } sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("Top Symbols:"); foreach (var kv in result.SymbolPnL .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value) .Take(10)) { sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key} : {kv.Value:F2}"); } sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("Top Symbol×Timeframe:"); foreach (var kv in result.SymbolTimeframePnL .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value) .Take(10)) { sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key} : {kv.Value:F2}"); } sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("SECTION F — EXECUTIVE INTERPRETATION"); sb.AppendLine("------------------------------------"); if (!anyFailure) { sb.AppendLine("Reconciliation integrity is currently acceptable. The major reporting layers are economically aligned."); } else { sb.AppendLine("Reconciliation integrity is currently not acceptable."); sb.AppendLine("Do not trust headline end-equity or total-return numbers until the failed residual checks are brought near zero."); } string path = Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"REPORT_31_RECONCILIATION_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"); File.WriteAllText(path, sb.ToString(), Encoding.UTF8); } private static void AppendResidual(StringBuilder sb, string label, decimal residual, bool pass) { sb.AppendLine($"{label,-36} : {residual,18:F2} {(pass ? "PASS" : "FAIL")}"); } private static bool IsWithinTolerance(decimal value) { return Math.Abs(value) <= 0.01m; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ R e p o r t P o r t a l P u b l i s h S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 1 6 . 0 4 K B L I N E S : 3 4 6 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Diagnostics; using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class ReportPortalPublishService { private const string PortalRootFolderName = "TQGA_REPORT_PORTAL"; private const string SiteFolderName = "site"; private const string RawFolderName = "raw"; private static readonly LocalStaticSiteHost _localHost = new(); public PublishPortalResult PublishLatestReports() { string reportDir = DataPaths.Reports; Directory.CreateDirectory(reportDir); string portalRoot = ResolvePortalRoot(reportDir); string siteDir = Path.Combine(portalRoot, SiteFolderName); string rawDir = Path.Combine(siteDir, RawFolderName); Directory.CreateDirectory(portalRoot); Directory.CreateDirectory(siteDir); Directory.CreateDirectory(rawDir); ClearDirectoryContents(siteDir, [RawFolderName]); ClearDirectoryContents(rawDir, []); List allFiles = Directory .GetFiles(reportDir, "*.*", SearchOption.AllDirectories) .OrderBy(x => x, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase) .ToList(); List entries = []; foreach (string filePath in allFiles) { string relativePath = Path.GetRelativePath(reportDir, filePath); string normalizedRelativePath = relativePath.Replace('\\', '/'); string rawRelativePath = normalizedRelativePath; string rawOutputPath = Path.Combine(rawDir, relativePath); string? rawOutputFolder = Path.GetDirectoryName(rawOutputPath); if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(rawOutputFolder)) Directory.CreateDirectory(rawOutputFolder); File.Copy(filePath, rawOutputPath, overwrite: true); FileInfo info = new(filePath); bool isTextReport = info.Extension.Equals(".txt", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase); string? htmlPageFileName = null; if (isTextReport) { string htmlSafeName = BuildHtmlPageFileName(relativePath); string htmlPath = Path.Combine(siteDir, htmlSafeName); string content = ReadAllTextSafe(filePath); File.WriteAllText( htmlPath, BuildReportHtml( displayName: relativePath, sourcePath: filePath, info: info, content: content, rawHref: BuildRawHref(rawRelativePath)), Encoding.UTF8); htmlPageFileName = htmlSafeName; } entries.Add(new PublishedReportEntry { DisplayName = relativePath, SourcePath = filePath, RelativeRawPath = rawRelativePath, HtmlPageFileName = htmlPageFileName, IsTextReport = isTextReport, Modified = info.LastWriteTime, SizeBytes = info.Length }); } string indexPath = Path.Combine(siteDir, "index.html"); File.WriteAllText( indexPath, BuildIndexHtml(reportDir, siteDir, entries), Encoding.UTF8); string baseUrl = _localHost.Start(siteDir, 8787); string localWebUrl = baseUrl + "index.html"; TryOpenInBrowser(localWebUrl); return new PublishPortalResult { Success = true, ReportDirectory = reportDir, PortalRootDirectory = portalRoot, SiteDirectory = siteDir, IndexFilePath = indexPath, ReportCount = entries.Count, LocalWebUrl = localWebUrl }; } private static string ResolvePortalRoot(string reportDir) { DirectoryInfo? current = new(reportDir); while (current != null) { if (current.Name.Equals("D DATA BACKUP", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) return Path.Combine(current.FullName, PortalRootFolderName); current = current.Parent; } string reportParent = Directory.GetParent(reportDir)?.FullName ?? reportDir; return Path.Combine(reportParent, PortalRootFolderName); } private static void ClearDirectoryContents(string rootDir, IReadOnlyList keepFolderNames) { if (!Directory.Exists(rootDir)) return; foreach (string file in Directory.GetFiles(rootDir, "*", SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly)) File.Delete(file); foreach (string dir in Directory.GetDirectories(rootDir, "*", SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly)) { string name = Path.GetFileName(dir); if (keepFolderNames.Contains(name, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) continue; Directory.Delete(dir, recursive: true); } } private static string ReadAllTextSafe(string path) { try { return File.ReadAllText(path, Encoding.UTF8); } catch { return File.ReadAllText(path); } } private static string BuildHtmlPageFileName(string relativePath) { string safe = relativePath .Replace('\\', '_') .Replace('/', '_') .Replace(':', '_') .Replace(' ', '_'); if (safe.EndsWith(".txt", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) safe = safe[..^4]; return safe + ".html"; } private static string BuildRawHref(string relativeRawPath) { IEnumerable segments = relativeRawPath .Replace('\\', '/') .Split('/', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries) .Select(Uri.EscapeDataString); return "raw/" + string.Join("/", segments); } private static string BuildReportHtml( string displayName, string sourcePath, FileInfo info, string content, string rawHref) { string escapedName = Html(displayName); string escapedSource = Html(sourcePath); string escapedContent = Html(content); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine($" {escapedName}"); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine("
← Back to index
"); sb.AppendLine($"

{escapedName}

"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine($"
Source: {escapedSource}
"); sb.AppendLine($"
Modified: {info.LastWriteTime:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}
"); sb.AppendLine($"
Size: {info.Length:N0} bytes
"); sb.AppendLine($"
Raw File: {escapedName}
"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine($" 
{escapedContent}
"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); return sb.ToString(); } private static string BuildIndexHtml( string reportDir, string siteDir, IReadOnlyList entries) { var rows = new StringBuilder(); foreach (PublishedReportEntry entry in entries.OrderBy(x => x.DisplayName, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { string rawHref = BuildRawHref(entry.RelativeRawPath); string viewCell = entry.IsTextReport && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(entry.HtmlPageFileName) ? $"view" : "-"; rows.AppendLine(" "); rows.AppendLine($" {Html(entry.DisplayName)}"); rows.AppendLine($" {entry.Modified:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}"); rows.AppendLine($" {entry.SizeBytes:N0}"); rows.AppendLine($" {viewCell}"); rows.AppendLine($" raw"); rows.AppendLine(" "); } if (rows.Length == 0) { rows.AppendLine(" "); rows.AppendLine(" No files found."); rows.AppendLine(" "); } var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" TQGA Research Reports"); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine("

TQGA Research Reports

"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine($"
Generated: {DateTime.Now:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}
"); sb.AppendLine($"
Report Folder: {Html(reportDir)}
"); sb.AppendLine($"
Site Folder: {Html(siteDir)}
"); sb.AppendLine($"
Total Files Published: {entries.Count}
"); sb.AppendLine($"
TXT Reports With HTML View: {entries.Count(x => x.IsTextReport)}
"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.Append(rows); sb.AppendLine(" "); sb.AppendLine("
FileModifiedSize (bytes)ViewRaw
"); sb.AppendLine("
"); sb.AppendLine(""); sb.AppendLine(""); return sb.ToString(); } private static string Html(string value) { return System.Net.WebUtility.HtmlEncode(value ?? string.Empty); } private static void TryOpenInBrowser(string urlOrPath) { Process.Start(new ProcessStartInfo { FileName = urlOrPath, UseShellExecute = true }); } private sealed class PublishedReportEntry { public string DisplayName { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string SourcePath { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string RelativeRawPath { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string? HtmlPageFileName { get; init; } public bool IsTextReport { get; init; } public DateTime Modified { get; init; } public long SizeBytes { get; init; } } } public sealed class PublishPortalResult { public bool Success { get; init; } public string ReportDirectory { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string PortalRootDirectory { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string SiteDirectory { get; init; } = string.Empty; public string IndexFilePath { get; init; } = string.Empty; public int ReportCount { get; init; } public string LocalWebUrl { get; init; } = string.Empty; } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ S t r a t e g y C o n t r i b u t i o n R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 9 7 K B L I N E S : 2 8 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class StrategyContributionReportService { public void Generate(Dictionary pnl) { Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("REPORT 08 — STRATEGY CONTRIBUTION"); sb.AppendLine("=================================="); sb.AppendLine(); if (pnl == null || pnl.Count == 0) { sb.AppendLine("NO DATA: StrategyPnL is empty."); } else { foreach (var p in pnl.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)) sb.AppendLine($"Strategy {p.Key:00} → PnL {p.Value:F2}"); } File.WriteAllText( Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"REPORT_08_STRATEGY_PNL_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"), sb.ToString()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ S t r a t e g y S y m b o l T i m e f r a m e P n l R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 1 . 5 8 K B L I N E S : 3 6 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class StrategySymbolTimeframePnlReportService { public void Generate(Dictionary strategySymbolTimeframePnL) { Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("REPORT 13 — STRATEGY × SYMBOL × TIMEFRAME PnL"); sb.AppendLine("============================================="); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("Key format: S##::SYMBOL::TF (example: S02::ATOMUSDT::1h)"); sb.AppendLine(); if (strategySymbolTimeframePnL == null || strategySymbolTimeframePnL.Count == 0) { sb.AppendLine("NO DATA"); } else { sb.AppendLine("TOP 100 (by PnL)"); sb.AppendLine("----------------"); foreach (var kv in strategySymbolTimeframePnL.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value).Take(100)) sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key,-32} {kv.Value,14:F2}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("FULL LIST (sorted by PnL desc)"); sb.AppendLine("------------------------------"); foreach (var kv in strategySymbolTimeframePnL.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)) sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key,-32} {kv.Value,14:F2}"); } var path = Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"REPORT_13_STRATEGY_SYMBOL_TF_PNL_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"); File.WriteAllText(path, sb.ToString()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ S t r u c t u r e R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 1 . 1 3 K B L I N E S : 3 4 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Paths; using TQGA.Application.Strategy; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class StructureReportService { public void Generate() { var strategyTypes = AppDomain.CurrentDomain .GetAssemblies() .SelectMany(a => a.GetTypes()) .Where(t => typeof(IStrategy).IsAssignableFrom(t) && !t.IsAbstract && !t.IsInterface) .OrderBy(t => t.Name) .ToList(); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("TQGA ARCHITECTURE REPORT"); sb.AppendLine("========================"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("REGISTERED STRATEGIES"); sb.AppendLine("---------------------"); int id = 1; foreach (var s in strategyTypes) { sb.AppendLine($"[{id:00}] {s.Name}"); id++; } File.WriteAllText( Path.Combine(DataPaths.Reports, $"STRUCTURE_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"), sb.ToString()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ S y m b o l H e a t m a p R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 9 9 K B L I N E S : 3 1 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.IO; using System.Linq; using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class SymbolHeatmapReportService { public void Generate(Dictionary pnl) { Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("REPORT 09 — SYMBOL HEATMAP"); sb.AppendLine("==========================="); sb.AppendLine(); if (pnl == null || pnl.Count == 0) { sb.AppendLine("NO DATA"); } else { foreach (var s in pnl.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)) sb.AppendLine($"{s.Key,-24} {s.Value,12:F2}"); } var path = Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"REPORT_09_SYMBOL_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"); File.WriteAllText(path, sb.ToString()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ S y m b o l T i m e f r a m e P n l R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 1 . 4 9 K B L I N E S : 3 6 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class SymbolTimeframePnlReportService { public void Generate(Dictionary symbolTimeframePnL) { Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("REPORT 11 — SYMBOL × TIMEFRAME PnL"); sb.AppendLine("================================="); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("Key format: SYMBOL::TF (example: ATOMUSDT::1h)"); sb.AppendLine(); if (symbolTimeframePnL == null || symbolTimeframePnL.Count == 0) { sb.AppendLine("NO DATA"); } else { sb.AppendLine("TOP 50 (by PnL)"); sb.AppendLine("----------------"); foreach (var kv in symbolTimeframePnL.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value).Take(50)) sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key,-24} {kv.Value,14:F2}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("FULL LIST (sorted by PnL desc)"); sb.AppendLine("------------------------------"); foreach (var kv in symbolTimeframePnL.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)) sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key,-24} {kv.Value,14:F2}"); } var path = Path.Combine( DataPaths.Reports, $"REPORT_11_SYMBOL_TF_PNL_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"); File.WriteAllText(path, sb.ToString()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ U n i v e r s a l R e s e a r c h R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 2 . 6 1 K B L I N E S : 6 2 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.Linq; using TQGA.Application.Backtesting; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class UniversalResearchReportService { public void GenerateAll( PortfolioBacktestResult result, DateTime runUtc, IReadOnlyList selectedStrategies) { ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(result); ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(selectedStrategies); // Keep existing reports untouched. // Only add meta-reports: // A84_00, A84_05, A84_06 // Optional extras already present in your architecture: // A84_01, A84_03 new A84MarketRegimeDetectionReportService().Generate(result); new A84AlphaDecayMonitoringReportService().Generate(result); // ===== Strategy Fitness → CIO gating ===== var fitnessSvc = new A84StrategyFitnessGatingReportService(); var cfg = new A84StrategyFitnessGatingReportService.FitnessConfig(); var (fitnessRows, allowed) = fitnessSvc.ComputeFitness(result, cfg); // CIO recompute using ONLY allowed strategies var cioWeightsPostGating = fitnessSvc.RecomputeCioWeightsWithGating(result, allowed, cfg); // Write A84_05 (fitness + CIO gating) fitnessSvc.GenerateAndWrite(result, runUtc, cfg); // Convert FitnessRow -> StrategyFitnessSnapshot var fitnessSnapshots = fitnessRows.ToDictionary( kv => kv.Key, kv => new StrategyFitnessSnapshot { StrategyId = kv.Value.StrategyId, StrategyCode = kv.Value.StrategyCode, PnL = kv.Value.PnL, Trades = kv.Value.Trades, Exits = kv.Value.Exits, FitnessScore = kv.Value.FitnessScore, Allowed = kv.Value.Allowed, GateReason = kv.Value.GateReason }); // Write A84_00 Executive Summary new A84ExecutiveSummaryReportService().GenerateAndWrite( result, runUtc, selectedStrategies, cioWeightsPostGating, recentMinutesWindow: 10); // Write A84_06 ChatGPT compact upload summary // Actual method signature is: // (result, runUtc, selectedStrategies, fitness, allowedStrategyIds, cioWeightsPostGating) new A84ChatGptUploadReportService().GenerateAndWrite( result, runUtc, selectedStrategies, fitnessSnapshots, allowed, cioWeightsPostGating); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S e r v i c e s \ W a l k F o r w a r d V a l i d a t i o n R e p o r t S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 6 . 6 5 K B L I N E S : 1 3 9 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Text; using TQGA.Application.Backtesting; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Application.Services; public sealed class WalkForwardValidationReportService { public void GenerateProxyReports( PortfolioBacktestResult result, DateTime runUtc, IReadOnlyList selectedStrategies) { ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(result); ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(selectedStrategies); Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports); var stamp = runUtc.ToString("yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"); var wf01 = Path.Combine(DataPaths.Reports, $"WF_01_SPLITS_{stamp}.txt"); var wf02 = Path.Combine(DataPaths.Reports, $"WF_02_FOLD_SUMMARY_{stamp}.txt"); var wf05 = Path.Combine(DataPaths.Reports, $"WF_05_WALKFORWARD_EQUITY_{stamp}.csv"); var wf06 = Path.Combine(DataPaths.Reports, $"WF_06_CHATGPT_UPLOAD_{stamp}.txt"); var folds = result.WalkForwardFolds .OrderBy(x => x.FoldNo) .ToList(); if (folds.Count == 0) { File.WriteAllText(wf01, "WF_01 — SPLITS\r\n================\r\n\r\nNo walk-forward folds available."); File.WriteAllText(wf02, "WF_02 — FOLD SUMMARY\r\n=====================\r\n\r\nNo walk-forward folds available."); File.WriteAllText(wf05, "Fold,TrainStartUtc,TrainEndUtc,TestStartUtc,TestEndUtc,StartEquity,EndEquity,ReturnPct,TestPoints\r\n"); File.WriteAllText(wf06, "WF_06 — CHATGPT UPLOAD\r\n=======================\r\n\r\nNo walk-forward folds available."); return; } WriteSplitReport(wf01, runUtc, selectedStrategies, folds); WriteFoldSummaryReport(wf02, runUtc, folds); WriteWalkForwardEquityCsv(wf05, folds); WriteCompactUpload(wf06, runUtc, selectedStrategies, folds, result); } private static void WriteSplitReport( string path, DateTime runUtc, IReadOnlyList selectedStrategies, IReadOnlyList folds) { var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("WF_01 — TRUE WALK-FORWARD SPLITS"); sb.AppendLine("================================"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine($"Run Timestamp (UTC) : {runUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}"); sb.AppendLine($"Strategies Selected : {selectedStrategies.Count}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("METHOD"); sb.AppendLine("------"); sb.AppendLine("Rule-based walk-forward rerun."); sb.AppendLine("Each fold uses chronological train warmup followed by unseen test window evaluation."); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("FOLDS"); sb.AppendLine("-----"); foreach (var f in folds) { sb.AppendLine( $"Fold {f.FoldNo:00} | TRAIN {f.TrainStartUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} -> {f.TrainEndUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} | TEST {f.TestStartUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} -> {f.TestEndUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} | TestPoints {f.TestPoints}"); } File.WriteAllText(path, sb.ToString()); } private static void WriteFoldSummaryReport( string path, DateTime runUtc, IReadOnlyList folds) { var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("WF_02 — TRUE FOLD SUMMARY"); sb.AppendLine("========================="); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine($"Run Timestamp (UTC) : {runUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("Fold | Start Equity | End Equity | Return % | Test Points"); sb.AppendLine("-----+--------------+------------+----------+------------"); foreach (var f in folds) { sb.AppendLine( $"{f.FoldNo,4} | {f.StartEquity,12:F2} | {f.EndEquity,10:F2} | {f.ReturnPct,8:F2} | {f.TestPoints,10}"); } var positive = folds.Count(x => x.ReturnPct > 0m); var negative = folds.Count(x => x.ReturnPct < 0m); var stability = folds.Count == 0 ? 0m : (decimal)positive / folds.Count * 100m; sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("SUMMARY"); sb.AppendLine("-------"); sb.AppendLine($"Positive folds : {positive}"); sb.AppendLine($"Negative folds : {negative}"); sb.AppendLine($"Fold stability : {stability:F2}%"); File.WriteAllText(path, sb.ToString()); } private static void WriteWalkForwardEquityCsv( string path, IReadOnlyList folds) { var lines = new List { "Fold,TrainStartUtc,TrainEndUtc,TestStartUtc,TestEndUtc,StartEquity,EndEquity,ReturnPct,TestPoints" }; lines.AddRange(folds.Select(f => $"{f.FoldNo},{f.TrainStartUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss},{f.TrainEndUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss},{f.TestStartUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss},{f.TestEndUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss},{f.StartEquity:F2},{f.EndEquity:F2},{f.ReturnPct:F4},{f.TestPoints}")); File.WriteAllLines(path, lines); } private static void WriteCompactUpload( string path, DateTime runUtc, IReadOnlyList selectedStrategies, IReadOnlyList folds, PortfolioBacktestResult result) { var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("WF_06 — CHATGPT UPLOAD"); sb.AppendLine("======================"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine($"Run Timestamp (UTC) : {runUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}"); sb.AppendLine($"Strategies Selected : {selectedStrategies.Count}"); sb.AppendLine($"Equity Points : {result.PortfolioEquityTimeline.Count}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("NOTE"); sb.AppendLine("----"); sb.AppendLine("True rule-based walk-forward rerun with chronological train warmup and unseen test windows."); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("FOLD RETURNS"); sb.AppendLine("------------"); foreach (var f in folds) { sb.AppendLine( $"Fold {f.FoldNo:00} | TestReturn {f.ReturnPct:F2}% | TestPoints {f.TestPoints}"); } var best = folds.OrderByDescending(x => x.ReturnPct).First(); var worst = folds.OrderBy(x => x.ReturnPct).First(); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine("EXTREMES"); sb.AppendLine("--------"); sb.AppendLine($"Best Fold : F{best.FoldNo:00} {best.ReturnPct:F2}%"); sb.AppendLine($"Worst Fold : F{worst.FoldNo:00} {worst.ReturnPct:F2}%"); File.WriteAllText(path, sb.ToString()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S t r a t e g y \ D i a g n o s t i c Q u a n t S t r a t e g y . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 2 . 4 K B L I N E S : 7 4 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Domain.Trading; namespace TQGA.Application.Strategy; public sealed class DiagnosticQuantStrategy : QuantStrategy { public override string Name => "Regime Pullback Quant"; private int _ticks; private int _emaLong; private int _rsiLong; private int _rsiExit; private bool _bullishRegime; private int _entries; private int _exits; public override void Initialize() { } public override TradeSignal OnTick(StrategyContext context) { _ticks++; bool pullback = false; bool exit = false; foreach (var signal in Signals) { var result = signal.Evaluate(context); if (signal.GetType().Name == "EmaCrossSignal") { if (result == TradeSignal.Long) { _bullishRegime = true; _emaLong++; } } if (signal.GetType().Name == "RsiReversionSignal") { if (result == TradeSignal.Long) { pullback = true; _rsiLong++; } if (result == TradeSignal.Exit) { exit = true; _rsiExit++; } } } if (_bullishRegime && pullback && !context.HasOpenPosition) { _entries++; return TradeSignal.Long; } if (context.HasOpenPosition && exit) { _exits++; return TradeSignal.Exit; } return TradeSignal.None; } public void PrintStats() { Console.WriteLine("\n========= SIGNAL TELEMETRY ========="); Console.WriteLine($"Ticks processed : {_ticks}"); Console.WriteLine($"EMA bullish signals : {_emaLong}"); Console.WriteLine($"RSI pullbacks : {_rsiLong}"); Console.WriteLine($"RSI exits : {_rsiExit}"); Console.WriteLine($"Entries : {_entries}"); Console.WriteLine($"Exits : {_exits}"); Console.WriteLine($"Regime active : {_bullishRegime}"); Console.WriteLine("====================================\n"); } public void AddSignal(ISignal signal) { Signals.Add(signal); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S t r a t e g y \ I I n d i c a t o r . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 1 7 K B L I N E S : 8 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Application.Strategy; public interface IIndicator { string Name { get; } T Current { get; } void Update(decimal price); void Reset(); } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S t r a t e g y \ I S i g n a l . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 1 9 K B L I N E S : 1 2 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Application.Strategy; public enum TradeSignal { None, Long, Short, Exit } public interface ISignal { TradeSignal Evaluate(StrategyContext context); } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S t r a t e g y \ I S t r a t e g y . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 1 7 K B L I N E S : 7 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Application.Strategy; public interface IStrategy { string Name { get; } void Initialize(); TradeSignal OnTick(StrategyContext context); } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S t r a t e g y \ Q u a n t S t r a t e g y . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 7 7 K B L I N E S : 2 6 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Domain.Trading; namespace TQGA.Application.Strategy; public abstract class QuantStrategy : IStrategy { public abstract string Name { get; } protected readonly List Signals = new(); public virtual void Initialize() { } // ✅ NEW — SIGNAL INJECTION SUPPORT (for StrategyFactory) public void SetSignals(IEnumerable signals) { Signals.Clear(); Signals.AddRange(signals); } public virtual TradeSignal OnTick(StrategyContext context) { foreach (var signal in Signals) { var result = signal.Evaluate(context); if (result != TradeSignal.None) return result; } return TradeSignal.None; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S t r a t e g y \ S t r a t e g y C o n t e x t . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 4 9 K B L I N E S : 1 9 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Application.Strategy; public sealed class StrategyContext { public decimal Price { get; } public DateTime Time { get; } public bool HasOpenPosition { get; } public decimal PositionSize { get; } public StrategyContext( decimal price, DateTime time, bool hasOpenPosition, decimal positionSize) { Price = price; Time = time; HasOpenPosition = hasOpenPosition; PositionSize = positionSize; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ S t r a t e g y \ S t r a t e g y F a c t o r y . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 2 . 4 4 K B L I N E S : 5 9 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.Linq; using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection; namespace TQGA.Application.Strategy; /// /// StrategyFactory is the ONLY place responsible for instantiating concrete strategies. /// - Uses ActivatorUtilities so DI can inject dependencies when needed. /// - Also provides discovery of concrete IStrategy types across loaded assemblies. /// public sealed class StrategyFactory { private readonly IServiceProvider _root; public StrategyFactory(IServiceProvider root) { _root = root; } /// /// Create a strategy instance of the provided type using DI. /// The type MUST implement IStrategy and MUST be concrete (not abstract). /// public IStrategy Create(Type strategyType) { if (strategyType is null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(strategyType)); if (!typeof(IStrategy).IsAssignableFrom(strategyType)) throw new ArgumentException($"Type '{strategyType.FullName}' does not implement IStrategy."); if (strategyType.IsAbstract || strategyType.IsInterface) throw new ArgumentException($"Type '{strategyType.FullName}' is abstract/interface and cannot be created."); var instance = ActivatorUtilities.CreateInstance(_root, strategyType); if (instance is not IStrategy strategy) throw new InvalidOperationException($"Activator created '{strategyType.FullName}' but it is not IStrategy."); return strategy; } /// /// Discovers all concrete IStrategy types from currently loaded assemblies. /// This avoids Application referencing Infrastructure directly. /// public static IReadOnlyList DiscoverConcreteStrategyTypes() { var types = AppDomain.CurrentDomain .GetAssemblies() .SelectMany(a => { try { return a.GetTypes(); } catch { return Array.Empty(); } }) .Where(t => t is not null && typeof(IStrategy).IsAssignableFrom(t) && !t.IsAbstract && !t.IsInterface) .Distinct() .OrderBy(t => t.Name) .ToList(); return types; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ T r a d i n g \ I O r d e r E x e c u t o r . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 4 2 K B L I N E S : 1 6 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Domain.Trading; namespace TQGA.Application.Trading; public interface IOrderExecutor { Task PlaceMarketOrderAsync( string symbol, TradeSide side, decimal quantity, CancellationToken ct); Task ClosePositionAsync( string symbol, CancellationToken ct); // 🔥 BACKTEST PRICE PIPE void UpdateMarketPrice(decimal price); decimal GetFillPrice(); } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ T r a d i n g \ I P o s i t i o n R e p o s i t o r y . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 2 5 K B L I N E S : 9 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Domain.Trading; namespace TQGA.Application.Trading; public interface IPositionRepository { bool HasOpenPosition(); decimal CurrentSize(); void Open(TradeSide side, decimal quantity, decimal price); void Close(decimal price); } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ T r a d i n g \ I T r a d i n g E n g i n e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 2 1 K B L I N E S : 9 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Application.Trading; public interface ITradingEngine { Task OnTickAsync( string symbol, decimal lastPrice, DateTime time, CancellationToken ct = default); } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ T r a d i n g \ T r a d e D e c i s i o n D i a g n o s t i c s . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 2 . 4 6 K B L I N E S : 5 7 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Text; using System.Threading; namespace TQGA.Application.Trading; public sealed class TradeDecisionDiagnostics { // ================= INTERNAL COUNTERS ================= private int _ticksProcessed; private int _signalLong; private int _signalShort; private int _signalExit; private int _entryAttempts; private int _executedEntries; private int _executedExits; // ================= PUBLIC READ MODEL ================= public int TicksProcessed => _ticksProcessed; public int SignalLong => _signalLong; public int SignalShort => _signalShort; public int SignalExit => _signalExit; public int EntryAttempts => _entryAttempts; public int ExecutedEntries => _executedEntries; public int ExecutedExits => _executedExits; // ================= ENGINE WRITE API ================= public void OnTickProcessed() => Interlocked.Increment(ref _ticksProcessed); public void OnSignalLong() => Interlocked.Increment(ref _signalLong); public void OnSignalShort() => Interlocked.Increment(ref _signalShort); public void OnSignalExit() => Interlocked.Increment(ref _signalExit); public void OnEntryAttempt() => Interlocked.Increment(ref _entryAttempts); public void OnEntryExecuted() => Interlocked.Increment(ref _executedEntries); public void OnExitExecuted() => Interlocked.Increment(ref _executedExits); public void Reset() { _ticksProcessed = 0; _signalLong = 0; _signalShort = 0; _signalExit = 0; _entryAttempts = 0; _executedEntries = 0; _executedExits = 0; } // ================= REPORT BUILDER ================= public string BuildReport() { var sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.AppendLine("EXECUTION ATTRIBUTION"); sb.AppendLine("====================="); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine($"Ticks processed : {TicksProcessed}"); sb.AppendLine($"Signal LONG : {SignalLong}"); sb.AppendLine($"Signal SHORT : {SignalShort}"); sb.AppendLine($"Signal EXIT : {SignalExit}"); sb.AppendLine(); sb.AppendLine($"Entry attempts : {EntryAttempts}"); sb.AppendLine($"Executed Entries : {ExecutedEntries}"); sb.AppendLine($"Executed Exits : {ExecutedExits}"); return sb.ToString(); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ T r a d i n g \ T r a d e R e s u l t . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 1 5 K B L I N E S : 6 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Application.Trading; public sealed record TradeResult( DateTime Time, decimal TradePnL, decimal Equity, decimal Drawdown); = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ T r a d i n g \ T r a d i n g E n g i n e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 4 . 4 K B L I N E S : 1 3 0 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Accounting; using TQGA.Application.Risk; using TQGA.Application.Strategy; using TQGA.Domain.Trading; namespace TQGA.Application.Trading; public sealed class TradingEngine : ITradingEngine { private readonly IStrategy _strategy; private readonly IOrderExecutor _executor; private readonly TradeLedger _ledger; private readonly EquityCurve _equity; private readonly ICapitalAllocator _capital; private readonly IRiskManager _risk; private readonly TradeDecisionDiagnostics _diag; private Trade? _openTrade; public TradingEngine( IStrategy strategy, IOrderExecutor executor, TradeLedger ledger, EquityCurve equity, ICapitalAllocator capital, IRiskManager risk, TradeDecisionDiagnostics diag) { _strategy = strategy; _executor = executor; _ledger = ledger; _equity = equity; _capital = capital; _risk = risk; _diag = diag; } public async Task OnTickAsync( string symbol, decimal price, DateTime time, CancellationToken ct) { // Market sync (executor uses last price as fill in backtests) _executor.UpdateMarketPrice(price); _diag.OnTickProcessed(); // Mark-to-market equity update if (_openTrade != null) { var unrealized = (_openTrade.Side == TradeSide.Buy ? price - _openTrade.EntryPrice : _openTrade.EntryPrice - price) * _openTrade.Quantity; _equity.Update(time, _capital.CurrentEquity + unrealized); } else { _equity.Update(time, _capital.CurrentEquity); } // Strategy decision var context = new StrategyContext( price, time, _openTrade != null, _openTrade?.Quantity ?? 0m); var signal = _strategy.OnTick(context); // ========= ENTRY (LONG) ========= if (signal == TradeSignal.Long) { _diag.OnSignalLong(); if (_openTrade != null) return; if (!_risk.CanContinueTrading()) return; var size = _capital.GetOrderSize(symbol, price); if (size <= 0m) return; if (!_risk.CanEnterPosition(size)) return; _diag.OnEntryAttempt(); await _executor.PlaceMarketOrderAsync( symbol, TradeSide.Buy, size, ct); var fillPrice = _executor.GetFillPrice(); _openTrade = new Trade( symbol, TradeSide.Buy, size, fillPrice, time); _diag.OnEntryExecuted(); return; } // ========= ENTRY (SHORT) ========= if (signal == TradeSignal.Short) { _diag.OnSignalShort(); if (_openTrade != null) return; if (!_risk.CanContinueTrading()) return; var size = _capital.GetOrderSize(symbol, price); if (size <= 0m) return; if (!_risk.CanEnterPosition(size)) return; _diag.OnEntryAttempt(); await _executor.PlaceMarketOrderAsync( symbol, TradeSide.Sell, size, ct); var fillPrice = _executor.GetFillPrice(); _openTrade = new Trade( symbol, TradeSide.Sell, size, fillPrice, time); _diag.OnEntryExecuted(); return; } // ========= EXIT ========= if (signal == TradeSignal.Exit) { _diag.OnSignalExit(); if (_openTrade == null) return; await _executor.ClosePositionAsync(symbol, ct); var fillPrice = _executor.GetFillPrice(); _openTrade.Close(fillPrice, time); // Bookkeeping _ledger.Record(_openTrade); _capital.OnTradeClosed(_openTrade.RealizedPnL); _risk.OnTradeClosed(_openTrade.RealizedPnL); _diag.OnExitExecuted(); _openTrade = null; return; } } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . D o m a i n \ E n t i t y . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 0 6 K B L I N E S : 2 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Domain; public abstract class Entity { } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . D o m a i n \ G l o b a l U s i n g s . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 1 8 K B L I N E S : 6 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = global using System; global using System.Collections.Generic; global using System.Linq; global using System.Threading; global using System.Threading.Tasks; global using System.IO; = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . D o m a i n \ I n d i c a t o r s \ E m a . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 4 5 K B L I N E S : 1 8 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Domain.Indicators; public sealed class Ema : IIndicator { private readonly decimal _alpha; private decimal? _ema; public Ema(int period) { _alpha = 2m / (period + 1); } public void Add(decimal value) { _ema = _ema == null ? value : value * _alpha + _ema.Value * (1 - _alpha); } public decimal Value => _ema ?? 0m; public bool IsReady => _ema.HasValue; } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . D o m a i n \ I n d i c a t o r s \ I I n d i c a t o r . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 1 5 K B L I N E S : 7 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Domain.Indicators; public interface IIndicator { void Add(decimal value); decimal Value { get; } bool IsReady { get; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . D o m a i n \ I n d i c a t o r s \ R s i . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 1 . 7 3 K B L I N E S : 6 5 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Domain.Indicators; public sealed class Rsi { private readonly int _period; private decimal _avgGain; private decimal _avgLoss; private decimal? _previousPrice; private int _samples; public bool IsReady => _samples >= _period; public decimal Value { get; private set; } public Rsi(int period) { if (period <= 0) throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(period)); _period = period; } public void Update(decimal price) { if (_previousPrice == null) { _previousPrice = price; return; } var change = price - _previousPrice.Value; var gain = change > 0 ? change : 0; var loss = change < 0 ? -change : 0; if (_samples < _period) { _avgGain += gain; _avgLoss += loss; _samples++; if (_samples == _period) { _avgGain /= _period; _avgLoss /= _period; CalculateRsi(); } } else { _avgGain = (_avgGain * (_period - 1) + gain) / _period; _avgLoss = (_avgLoss * (_period - 1) + loss) / _period; CalculateRsi(); } _previousPrice = price; } private void CalculateRsi() { if (_avgLoss == 0) { Value = 100; return; } var rs = _avgGain / _avgLoss; Value = 100 - (100 / (1 + rs)); } public void Reset() { _avgGain = 0; _avgLoss = 0; _previousPrice = null; _samples = 0; Value = 0; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . D o m a i n \ M a r k e t \ C a n d l e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 5 8 K B L I N E S : 2 5 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Domain.Market; public sealed class Candle { public DateTime Time { get; } public decimal Open { get; } public decimal High { get; } public decimal Low { get; } public decimal Close { get; } public decimal Volume { get; } public Candle( DateTime time, decimal open, decimal high, decimal low, decimal close, decimal volume) { Time = time; Open = open; High = high; Low = low; Close = close; Volume = volume; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . D o m a i n \ T r a d i n g \ P o s i t i o n . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 4 9 K B L I N E S : 1 7 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Domain.Trading; public sealed class Position { public string Symbol { get; } public decimal Quantity { get; private set; } public decimal EntryPrice { get; private set; } public Position(string symbol, decimal quantity, decimal entryPrice) { Symbol = symbol; Quantity = quantity; EntryPrice = entryPrice; } public decimal UnrealizedPnl(decimal currentPrice) { return (currentPrice - EntryPrice) * Quantity; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . D o m a i n \ T r a d i n g \ S i g n a l . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 0 8 K B L I N E S : 7 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Domain.Trading; public enum Signal { Hold, Buy, Sell } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . D o m a i n \ T r a d i n g \ T r a d e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 1 . 0 4 K B L I N E S : 3 6 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Domain.Trading; public sealed class Trade { public string Symbol { get; } public TradeSide Side { get; } public decimal Quantity { get; } public decimal EntryPrice { get; } public DateTime EntryTime { get; } public decimal? ExitPrice { get; private set; } public DateTime? ExitTime { get; private set; } public bool IsClosed => ExitPrice.HasValue; public Trade( string symbol, TradeSide side, decimal quantity, decimal entryPrice, DateTime entryTime) { Symbol = symbol; Side = side; Quantity = quantity; EntryPrice = entryPrice; EntryTime = entryTime; } public void Close(decimal exitPrice, DateTime exitTime) { ExitPrice = exitPrice; ExitTime = exitTime; } public decimal RealizedPnL => !IsClosed ? 0m : Side == TradeSide.Buy ? (ExitPrice!.Value - EntryPrice) * Quantity : (EntryPrice - ExitPrice!.Value) * Quantity; } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . D o m a i n \ T r a d i n g \ T r a d e S i d e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 0 8 K B L I N E S : 6 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Domain.Trading; public enum TradeSide { Buy, Sell } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ D e p e n d e n c y I n j e c t i o n . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 9 3 K B L I N E S : 2 1 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection; using TQGA.Application.Interfaces; using TQGA.Infrastructure.MarketData; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure; public static class DependencyInjection { public static IServiceCollection AddInfrastructure(this IServiceCollection services) { // ✅ Market data feed for backtesting / research services.AddSingleton(); // ✅ Bootstrapper used by WinForms buttons (Download / Update) services.AddSingleton(); // NOTE: // If you previously had services.AddHttpClient() here and got CS1061, // you can keep this file clean and let BinanceDownloader internally // create HttpClient (or you install Microsoft.Extensions.Http package). // // For now: avoid AddHttpClient here to keep build stable. return services; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ G l o b a l U s i n g s . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 2 1 K B L I N E S : 7 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = global using System; global using System.Collections.Generic; global using System.Linq; global using System.IO; global using System.Net.Http; global using System.Threading; global using System.Threading.Tasks; = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A .
