I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ D a t a \ C a n d l e D a t a C l e a n e r . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 3 . 1 K B L I N E S : 1 0 1 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Globalization; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Data; public sealed class CandleDataCleaner { private readonly string _candlesRoot; public CandleDataCleaner(string candlesRoot) { _candlesRoot = candlesRoot; } public void Run() { var files = Directory.GetFiles(_candlesRoot, "*.csv"); foreach (var file in files) { Console.WriteLine($"\n🧹 CLEANING: {Path.GetFileName(file)}"); Backup(file); var cleaned = CleanFile(file); File.WriteAllLines(file, cleaned); Console.WriteLine("✅ DONE"); } } private static void Backup(string file) { var backup = file + ".bak"; File.Copy(file, backup, true); Console.WriteLine("📦 Backup created"); } private static List CleanFile(string file) { var lines = File.ReadAllLines(file).ToList(); var header = lines.First(); var candles = lines .Skip(1) .Select(Parse) .Where(x => x != null) .Select(x => x!) .ToList(); // SORT candles = candles .OrderBy(c => c.Time) .ToList(); // REMOVE DUPLICATES candles = candles .GroupBy(c => c.Time) .Select(g => g.First()) .ToList(); // CHECK CONTINUITY ValidateContinuity(candles); // REBUILD var output = new List { header }; output.AddRange(candles.Select(ToCsv)); return output; } private static CandleRow? Parse(string line) { var p = line.Split(','); if (p.Length < 6) return null; return new CandleRow { Time = DateTime.Parse(p[0], CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), Open = p[1], High = p[2], Low = p[3], Close = p[4], Volume = p[5] }; } private static string ToCsv(CandleRow c) { return string.Join(",", c.Time.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"), c.Open, c.High, c.Low, c.Close, c.Volume); } private static void ValidateContinuity(List candles) { var expectedStep = TimeSpan.FromHours(1); for (int i = 1; i < candles.Count; i++) { var diff = candles[i].Time - candles[i - 1].Time; if (diff != expectedStep) { Console.WriteLine( $"⚠ GAP or overlap: {candles[i - 1].Time} → {candles[i].Time} ({diff})"); } } } private sealed class CandleRow { public DateTime Time { get; set; } public string Open { get; set; } = ""; public string High { get; set; } = ""; public string Low { get; set; } = ""; public string Close { get; set; } = ""; public string Volume { get; set; } = ""; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ M a r k e t D a t a \ B i n a n c e D o w n l o a d e r . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 2 . 3 1 K B L I N E S : 5 8 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Globalization; using System.Net.Http; using System.Text.Json; using TQGA.Domain.Market; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.MarketData; public sealed class BinanceDownloader { private static readonly HttpClient _http = new() { BaseAddress = new Uri("https://api.binance.com") }; private const int LimitPerRequest = 1000; public async Task> DownloadAsync( string symbol, string interval, DateTime startUtc, DateTime endUtc, CancellationToken ct) { var candles = new List(); long startMs = ToUnixMs(startUtc); long endMs = ToUnixMs(endUtc); while (startMs < endMs) { var url = $"/api/v3/klines?symbol={symbol}" + $"&interval={interval}" + $"&startTime={startMs}" + $"&endTime={endMs}" + $"&limit={LimitPerRequest}"; var response = await _http.GetAsync(url, ct); response.EnsureSuccessStatusCode(); var json = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync(ct); var data = JsonSerializer.Deserialize>>(json); if (data == null || data.Count == 0) break; foreach (var item in data) { var openTime = DateTimeOffset .FromUnixTimeMilliseconds(item[0].GetInt64()) .UtcDateTime; candles.Add(new Candle( openTime, decimal.Parse(item[1].GetString()!, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), decimal.Parse(item[2].GetString()!, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), decimal.Parse(item[3].GetString()!, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), decimal.Parse(item[4].GetString()!, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), decimal.Parse(item[5].GetString()!, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) )); } startMs = data.Last()[0].GetInt64() + 1; await Task.Delay(300, ct); // rate-limit safe } return candles; } private static long ToUnixMs(DateTime dt) => new DateTimeOffset(dt).ToUnixTimeMilliseconds(); } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ M a r k e t D a t a \ B i n a n c e D o w n l o a d e r S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 2 . 4 7 K B L I N E S : 6 3 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Net.Http.Json; using System.Text.Json; using TQGA.Infrastructure.MarketData; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Data; public sealed class BinanceDownloaderService { private readonly HttpClient _http = new(); private readonly BinanceRateLimiter _rateLimiter = new(); private readonly CandleFileWriter _writer = new(); public async Task IncrementalUpdateAsync( string symbol, string interval, IProgress? progress, CancellationToken ct) { var last = _writer.GetLastCandleTime(symbol, interval); DateTime start = last?.AddHours(1) ?? DateTime.UtcNow.AddYears(-5); DateTime end = DateTime.UtcNow; var allCandles = new List(); int batch = 0; while (start < end) { await _rateLimiter.WaitAsync(ct); var url = $"https://api.binance.com/api/v3/klines" + $"?symbol={symbol}" + $"&interval={interval}" + $"&startTime={new DateTimeOffset(start).ToUnixTimeMilliseconds()}" + $"&limit=1000"; var data = await RetryPolicy.ExecuteAsync(async () => await _http.GetStringAsync(url, ct)); var json = JsonDocument.Parse(data); if (json.RootElement.GetArrayLength() == 0) break; foreach (var item in json.RootElement.EnumerateArray()) { var line = $"{DateTimeOffset.FromUnixTimeMilliseconds(item[0].GetInt64()).UtcDateTime:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm}," + $"{item[1]}," + $"{item[2]}," + $"{item[3]}," + $"{item[4]}," + $"{item[5]}"; allCandles.Add(line); } // JsonElement does not support the C# Index (^) operator on its indexer, // so compute the last index explicitly. var arrLen = json.RootElement.GetArrayLength(); if (arrLen == 0) break; start = DateTimeOffset .FromUnixTimeMilliseconds( json.RootElement[arrLen - 1][0].GetInt64()) .UtcDateTime .AddHours(1); batch++; progress?.Report(batch); } _writer.AppendOrCreate(symbol, interval, allCandles); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ M a r k e t D a t a \ B i n a n c e R a t e L i m i t e r . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 8 1 K B L I N E S : 2 6 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Threading; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Data; public sealed class BinanceRateLimiter { private readonly SemaphoreSlim _semaphore = new(1, 1); private DateTime _lastCall = DateTime.MinValue; private const int MinDelayMs = 250; // 4 calls per second max public async Task WaitAsync(CancellationToken ct) { await _semaphore.WaitAsync(ct); try { var elapsed = DateTime.UtcNow - _lastCall; if (elapsed.TotalMilliseconds < MinDelayMs) { var delay = MinDelayMs - (int)elapsed.TotalMilliseconds; await Task.Delay(delay, ct); } _lastCall = DateTime.UtcNow; } finally { _semaphore.Release(); } } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ M a r k e t D a t a \ B i n a n c e U n i v e r s e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 1 . 6 5 K B L I N E S : 7 8 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.MarketData; public static class BinanceUniverse { public static readonly string[] Timeframes = [ "1h", "4h", "1d" ]; public static readonly string[] Top40 = [ "BTCUSDT", "ETHUSDT", "BNBUSDT", "SOLUSDT", "XRPUSDT", "ADAUSDT", "DOGEUSDT", "TRXUSDT", "AVAXUSDT", "DOTUSDT", "LINKUSDT", "MATICUSDT", "LTCUSDT", "BCHUSDT", "ATOMUSDT", "ICPUSDT", "APTUSDT", "NEARUSDT", "FILUSDT", "ETCUSDT", "ARBUSDT", "OPUSDT", "INJUSDT", "SUIUSDT", "SEIUSDT", "TIAUSDT", "RUNEUSDT", "AAVEUSDT", "UNIUSDT", "MKRUSDT", "PEPEUSDT", "SHIBUSDT", "ORDIUSDT", "WIFUSDT", "JUPUSDT", "FETUSDT", "RNDRUSDT", "GRTUSDT", "ALGOUSDT", "VETUSDT" ]; public static readonly string[] Top20 = [ "BTCUSDT", "ETHUSDT", "BNBUSDT", "SOLUSDT", "XRPUSDT", "ADAUSDT", "DOGEUSDT", "TRXUSDT", "AVAXUSDT", "DOTUSDT", "LINKUSDT", "MATICUSDT", "LTCUSDT", "BCHUSDT", "ATOMUSDT", "ICPUSDT", "APTUSDT", "NEARUSDT", "FILUSDT", "ETCUSDT" ]; public static IReadOnlyList ActiveSymbols => Top40; public static int MarketCount => ActiveSymbols.Count * Timeframes.Length; } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ M a r k e t D a t a \ C a n d l e F i l e W r i t e r . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 2 . 5 7 K B L I N E S : 7 2 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Globalization; using TQGA.Infrastructure.MarketData; using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.MarketData; public sealed class CandleFileWriter { private static readonly string BasePath = DataPaths.Candles; private static string GetPath(string symbol, string interval) => Path.Combine(BasePath, $"{symbol}_{interval}.csv"); public DateTime? GetLastCandleTime(string symbol, string interval) { var path = GetPath(symbol, interval); if (!File.Exists(path)) return null; var lastLine = File.ReadLines(path).LastOrDefault(); if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(lastLine)) return null; var parts = lastLine.Split(','); return DateTime.Parse(parts[0], CultureInfo.InvariantCulture); } public void AppendOrCreate( string symbol, string interval, IEnumerable candles) { var path = GetPath(symbol, interval); var exists = File.Exists(path); using var writer = new StreamWriter(path, append: true); if (!exists) { writer.WriteLine("Time,Open,High,Low,Close,Volume"); } foreach (var c in candles) { writer.WriteLine(string.Join(",", c.Time.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"), c.Open.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), c.High.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), c.Low.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), c.Close.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), c.Volume.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) )); } } // Overload to accept preformatted CSV lines (used by downloader service) public void AppendOrCreate( string symbol, string interval, IEnumerable csvLines) { var path = GetPath(symbol, interval); var exists = File.Exists(path); using var writer = new StreamWriter(path, append: true); if (!exists) { writer.WriteLine("Time,Open,High,Low,Close,Volume"); } foreach (var line in csvLines) { writer.WriteLine(line); } } } public sealed class CandleDto { public DateTime Time { get; init; } public decimal Open { get; init; } public decimal High { get; init; } public decimal Low { get; init; } public decimal Close { get; init; } public decimal Volume { get; init; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ M a r k e t D a t a \ C s v C a n d l e D a t a F e e d . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 3 . 4 5 K B L I N E S : 8 9 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.Globalization; using System.IO; using TQGA.Application.Interfaces; using TQGA.Application.Paths; using TQGA.Domain.Market; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.MarketData; /// /// Reads candles from CSV files stored at: /// DataPaths.Candles\{SYMBOL}_{TF}.csv /// Example: BTCUSDT_1h.csv /// CSV expected columns: Time,Open,High,Low,Close,Volume /// public sealed class CsvCandleDataFeed : ICandleDataFeed { private readonly string _root; public CsvCandleDataFeed() { _root = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(DataPaths.Candles) ? Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "MarketData", "Candles") : DataPaths.Candles; } public IEnumerable GetCandles(string symbol, string timeframe) { if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(symbol)) throw new ArgumentException("Symbol is required.", nameof(symbol)); if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(timeframe)) throw new ArgumentException("Timeframe is required.", nameof(timeframe)); var file = Path.Combine(_root, $"{symbol}_{timeframe}.csv"); if (!File.Exists(file)) throw new FileNotFoundException($"Candle file not found: {file}"); foreach (var line in File.ReadLines(file)) { if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(line)) continue; // Skip header lines safely if (line.StartsWith("Time", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || line.StartsWith("Open", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) continue; var parts = line.Split(',', StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries); if (parts.Length < 6) continue; if (!TryParseTime(parts[0], out var t)) continue; if (!TryDec(parts[1], out var o)) continue; if (!TryDec(parts[2], out var h)) continue; if (!TryDec(parts[3], out var l)) continue; if (!TryDec(parts[4], out var c)) continue; // Volume sometimes missing/blank in some CSVs -> default to 0 decimal v = 0m; _ = TryDec(parts[5], out v); // ✅ Candle is immutable in your Domain: construct via ctor yield return new Candle(t, o, h, l, c, v); } } private static bool TryDec(string s, out decimal d) => decimal.TryParse(s, NumberStyles.Any, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, out d); private static bool TryParseTime(string raw, out DateTime t) { raw = raw.Trim(); // Unix ms or unix sec if (long.TryParse(raw, out var n)) { if (n > 1_000_000_000_000) // ms { t = DateTimeOffset.FromUnixTimeMilliseconds(n).UtcDateTime; return true; } if (n > 1_000_000_000) // sec { t = DateTimeOffset.FromUnixTimeSeconds(n).UtcDateTime; return true; } } // ISO time if (DateTime.TryParse( raw, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, DateTimeStyles.AssumeUniversal | DateTimeStyles.AdjustToUniversal, out t)) { t = DateTime.SpecifyKind(t, DateTimeKind.Utc); return true; } t = default; return false; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ M a r k e t D a t a \ C s v M a r k e t D a t a F e e d . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 7 2 K B L I N E S : 2 3 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Interfaces; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.MarketData; public sealed class CsvMarketDataFeed : IMarketDataFeed { private readonly List _prices = new(); private int _index; public CsvMarketDataFeed(string filePath) { if (!File.Exists(filePath)) throw new FileNotFoundException( $"Market data file not found: {filePath}"); _prices = File.ReadAllLines(filePath) .Skip(1) .Select(l => decimal.Parse(l.Split(',')[4])) .ToList(); } public decimal GetLastPrice(string symbol) { if (_index >= _prices.Count) return _prices.Last(); return _prices[_index++]; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ M a r k e t D a t a \ D u m m y M a r k e t D a t a F e e d . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 2 2 K B L I N E S : 7 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Interfaces; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.MarketData; public sealed class DummyMarketDataFeed : IMarketDataFeed { public decimal GetLastPrice(string symbol) => 123.45m; // placeholder } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ M a r k e t D a t a \ H i s t o r i c a l D a t a B o o t s t r a p p e r . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 2 . 3 4 K B L I N E S : 6 5 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Paths; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.MarketData; public sealed class HistoricalDataBootstrapper { private const int FullHistoryYears = 10; private readonly BinanceDownloader _downloader = new(); private readonly CandleFileWriter _writer = new(); public Task ForceFullDownloadAsync() => EnsureAsync(force: true); public Task UpdateAsync() => EnsureAsync(force: false); public async Task EnsureAsync(bool force = false) { Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Candles); foreach (var symbol in BinanceUniverse.ActiveSymbols) { foreach (var tf in BinanceUniverse.Timeframes) { var path = Path.Combine( DataPaths.Candles, $"{symbol}_{tf}.csv"); DateTime startUtc; if (!force && File.Exists(path)) { var last = _writer.GetLastCandleTime(symbol, tf); startUtc = last != null ? last.Value.Add(GetTimeframeStep(tf)) : DateTime.UtcNow.AddYears(-FullHistoryYears); } else { startUtc = DateTime.UtcNow.AddYears(-FullHistoryYears); } if (startUtc >= DateTime.UtcNow) continue; var candles = await _downloader.DownloadAsync( symbol, tf, startUtc, DateTime.UtcNow, CancellationToken.None); var dtos = candles.Select(c => new CandleDto { Time = c.Time, Open = c.Open, High = c.High, Low = c.Low, Close = c.Close, Volume = c.Volume }); _writer.AppendOrCreate(symbol, tf, dtos); } } } private static TimeSpan GetTimeframeStep(string tf) { return tf switch { "1h" => TimeSpan.FromHours(1), "4h" => TimeSpan.FromHours(4), "1d" => TimeSpan.FromDays(1), _ => TimeSpan.FromHours(1) }; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ M a r k e t D a t a \ R e t r y P o l i c y . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 5 7 K B L I N E S : 2 3 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Data; public static class RetryPolicy { public static async Task ExecuteAsync( Func> action, int maxAttempts = 5) { int attempt = 0; while (true) { try { return await action(); } catch when (attempt < maxAttempts) { attempt++; var delay = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(Math.Pow(2, attempt)); await Task.Delay(delay); } } } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ M a r k e t D a t a \ S c h e d u l e r S e r v i c e . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 6 6 K B L I N E S : 2 4 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Data; public sealed class SchedulerService { private readonly BinanceDownloaderService _service = new(); public void StartDailyUpdate( string symbol, string interval) { var timer = new System.Timers.Timer { Interval = TimeSpan.FromHours(24).TotalMilliseconds, AutoReset = true }; timer.Elapsed += async (_, _) => { await _service.IncrementalUpdateAsync( symbol, interval, null, CancellationToken.None); }; timer.Start(); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ R i s k \ S i m p l e R i s k M a n a g e r . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 7 8 K B L I N E S : 2 8 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Risk; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Risk; public sealed class SimpleRiskManager : IRiskManager { private readonly decimal _maxPositionSize; private readonly decimal _maxLoss; private decimal _cumulativePnl; // ✅ INSTITUTIONAL DEFAULTS public SimpleRiskManager( decimal maxPositionSize = 10_000m, decimal maxLoss = -5_000m) { _maxPositionSize = maxPositionSize; _maxLoss = maxLoss; } public bool CanEnterPosition(decimal orderSize) { return orderSize <= _maxPositionSize; } public bool CanContinueTrading() { return _cumulativePnl > _maxLoss; } public void OnTradeClosed(decimal pnl) { _cumulativePnl += pnl; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ S t r a t e g i e s \ A l t c o i n L e a d e r s h i p P u l l b a c k Q u a n t S t r a t e g y . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 3 8 K B L I N E S : 1 0 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Strategy; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Strategies; public sealed class AltcoinLeadershipPullbackQuantStrategy : QuantStrategy { public override string Name => "Altcoin Leadership Pullback (Regime-Gated)"; public AltcoinLeadershipPullbackQuantStrategy() { Signals.Add(new RegimeGatedAltcoinLeadershipPullbackSignal()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ S t r a t e g i e s \ E m a C r o s s S i g n a l . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 6 2 K B L I N E S : 2 0 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Strategy; using TQGA.Domain.Indicators; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Strategies; public sealed class EmaCrossSignal : ISignal { private readonly Ema _fast = new(50); private readonly Ema _slow = new(200); private bool _isBullish; public TradeSignal Evaluate(StrategyContext context) { _fast.Add(context.Price); _slow.Add(context.Price); if (!_fast.IsReady || !_slow.IsReady) return TradeSignal.None; _isBullish = _fast.Value > _slow.Value; return _isBullish ? TradeSignal.Long : TradeSignal.None; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ S t r a t e g i e s \ E m a R s i Q u a n t S t r a t e g y . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 3 5 K B L I N E S : 1 2 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Strategy; using TQGA.Domain.Indicators; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Strategies; public sealed class EmaRsiQuantStrategy : QuantStrategy { public override string Name => "EMA + RSI Quant"; public EmaRsiQuantStrategy() { Signals.Add(new EmaCrossSignal()); Signals.Add(new RsiReversionSignal()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ S t r a t e g i e s \ E m a T r e n d P u l l b a c k Q u a n t S t r a t e g y . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 3 3 K B L I N E S : 1 0 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Strategy; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Strategies; public sealed class EmaTrendPullbackQuantStrategy : QuantStrategy { public override string Name => "EMA Trend Pullback (50/200 + RSI14)"; public EmaTrendPullbackQuantStrategy() { Signals.Add(new TrendPullbackSignal()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ S t r a t e g i e s \ E m a T r e n d Q u a n t S t r a t e g y . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 2 9 K B L I N E S : 1 0 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Strategy; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Strategies; public sealed class EmaTrendQuantStrategy : QuantStrategy { public override string Name => "EMA Trend (50/200)"; public EmaTrendQuantStrategy() { Signals.Add(new EmaTrendSignal()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ S t r a t e g i e s \ E m a T r e n d S i g n a l . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 8 5 K B L I N E S : 2 3 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Strategy; using TQGA.Domain.Indicators; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Strategies; public sealed class EmaTrendSignal : ISignal { private readonly Ema _fast = new(50); private readonly Ema _slow = new(200); public TradeSignal Evaluate(StrategyContext context) { _fast.Add(context.Price); _slow.Add(context.Price); if (!_fast.IsReady || !_slow.IsReady) return TradeSignal.None; bool bullish = _fast.Value > _slow.Value; // Entry when trend is bullish and we are flat if (!context.HasOpenPosition && bullish) return TradeSignal.Long; // Exit when trend flips bearish and we are long if (context.HasOpenPosition && !bullish) return TradeSignal.Exit; return TradeSignal.None; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ S t r a t e g i e s \ R e g i m e G a t e d A l t c o i n L e a d e r s h i p P u l l b a c k S i g n a l . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 5 . 1 9 K B L I N E S : 1 4 2 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using System.Collections.Generic; using System.Linq; using TQGA.Application.Strategy; using TQGA.Domain.Indicators; using TQGA.Domain.Trading; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Strategies; public sealed class RegimeGatedAltcoinLeadershipPullbackSignal : ISignal { private readonly Ema _ema21 = new(21); private readonly Ema _ema50 = new(50); private readonly Ema _ema200 = new(200); private readonly Rsi _rsi14 = new(14); private readonly Queue _recentCloses = new(); private const int MaxRecent = 80; private decimal _lastPrice; private decimal _previousPrice; private bool _isPrimedForLongReentry; public TradeSignal Evaluate(StrategyContext context) { decimal price = context.Price; _previousPrice = _lastPrice; _lastPrice = price; _ema21.Add(price); _ema50.Add(price); _ema200.Add(price); _rsi14.Update(price); PushPrice(price); if (_recentCloses.Count < 60) return TradeSignal.None; if (!_ema21.IsReady || !_ema50.IsReady || !_ema200.IsReady || !_rsi14.IsReady) return TradeSignal.None; decimal ema21 = _ema21.Value; decimal ema50 = _ema50.Value; decimal ema200 = _ema200.Value; decimal rsi = _rsi14.Value; bool trendAligned = price > ema200 && ema21 > ema50 && ema50 > ema200; bool slopeStrong = ema21 > AverageRecent(10) && ema50 > AverageRecent(20); decimal extensionPctFromEma21 = PercentDistance(price, ema21); decimal extensionPctFromEma50 = PercentDistance(price, ema50); bool tooExtended = extensionPctFromEma21 > 8.50m || extensionPctFromEma50 > 18.00m; if (context.HasOpenPosition) { if (ShouldExitLong(price, ema21, ema50, rsi)) { _isPrimedForLongReentry = false; return TradeSignal.Exit; } return TradeSignal.None; } if (!trendAligned || !slopeStrong || tooExtended) { _isPrimedForLongReentry = false; return TradeSignal.None; } bool controlledPullback = price >= ema50 * 0.985m && price <= ema21 * 1.015m; bool pullbackDepthAcceptable = extensionPctFromEma21 <= 3.75m && price >= ema50 * 0.9925m; bool momentumStillHealthy = rsi >= 48m && rsi <= 68m; bool pullbackStructureHealthy = MinRecent(6) >= ema50 * 0.985m && CountClosesBelow(ema50, 6) <= 2; if (controlledPullback && pullbackDepthAcceptable && momentumStillHealthy && pullbackStructureHealthy) { _isPrimedForLongReentry = true; return TradeSignal.None; } bool bullishResumption = _isPrimedForLongReentry && _previousPrice > 0m && price > _previousPrice && price > ema21 && price > AverageRecent(3) && PercentDistance(price, _previousPrice) >= 0.20m; bool notLateChase = PercentDistance(price, ema21) <= 2.25m; bool localStrengthRecovered = price >= HighestRecent(5) * 0.995m; if (bullishResumption && notLateChase && localStrengthRecovered) { _isPrimedForLongReentry = false; return TradeSignal.Long; } return TradeSignal.None; } private bool ShouldExitLong(decimal price, decimal ema21, decimal ema50, decimal rsi) { bool lostFastTrend = price < ema21 * 0.9925m; bool lostMediumTrend = price < ema50 * 0.9975m; bool momentumFailure = rsi < 43m; bool sharpReversal = _previousPrice > 0m && PercentDistance(_previousPrice, price) >= 3.00m; return lostMediumTrend || (lostFastTrend && momentumFailure) || sharpReversal; } private void PushPrice(decimal price) { _recentCloses.Enqueue(price); while (_recentCloses.Count > MaxRecent) _recentCloses.Dequeue(); } private decimal AverageRecent(int n) { if (_recentCloses.Count == 0) return 0m; return _recentCloses.TakeLast(System.Math.Max(1, n)).Average(); } private decimal HighestRecent(int n) { if (_recentCloses.Count == 0) return 0m; return _recentCloses.TakeLast(System.Math.Max(1, n)).Max(); } private decimal MinRecent(int n) { if (_recentCloses.Count == 0) return 0m; return _recentCloses.TakeLast(System.Math.Max(1, n)).Min(); } private int CountClosesBelow(decimal level, int n) { if (_recentCloses.Count == 0) return 0; return _recentCloses .TakeLast(System.Math.Max(1, n)) .Count(x => x < level); } private static decimal PercentDistance(decimal a, decimal b) { if (b == 0m) return 0m; return System.Math.Abs((a - b) / b) * 100m; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ S t r a t e g i e s \ R s i R e v e r s i o n S i g n a l . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 6 9 K B L I N E S : 2 0 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Strategy; using TQGA.Domain.Indicators; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Strategies; public sealed class RsiReversionSignal : ISignal { private readonly Rsi _rsi = new(14); public TradeSignal Evaluate(StrategyContext context) { _rsi.Update(context.Price); if (!_rsi.IsReady) return TradeSignal.None; // ENTRY → pullback in uptrend if (!context.HasOpenPosition && _rsi.Value <= 45m) return TradeSignal.Long; // EXIT → momentum exhaustion if (context.HasOpenPosition && _rsi.Value >= 60m) return TradeSignal.Exit; return TradeSignal.None; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ S t r a t e g i e s \ R s i S w i n g Q u a n t S t r a t e g y . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 2 9 K B L I N E S : 1 0 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Strategy; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Strategies; public sealed class RsiSwingQuantStrategy : QuantStrategy { public override string Name => "RSI Swing (14)"; public RsiSwingQuantStrategy() { Signals.Add(new RsiSwingSignal()); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ S t r a t e g i e s \ R s i S w i n g S i g n a l . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 1 . 0 4 K B L I N E S : 2 8 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Strategy; using TQGA.Domain.Indicators; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Strategies; public sealed class RsiSwingSignal : ISignal { private readonly Ema _fast = new(50); private readonly Ema _slow = new(200); private readonly Rsi _rsi = new(14); public TradeSignal Evaluate(StrategyContext context) { _fast.Add(context.Price); _slow.Add(context.Price); _rsi.Update(context.Price); if (!_fast.IsReady || !_slow.IsReady || !_rsi.IsReady) return TradeSignal.None; bool bullishTrend = _fast.Value > _slow.Value; if (!context.HasOpenPosition && bullishTrend && _rsi.Value >= 38m && _rsi.Value <= 48m) return TradeSignal.Long; if (context.HasOpenPosition) { bool trendBroken = !bullishTrend; bool reboundComplete = _rsi.Value >= 60m; if (trendBroken || reboundComplete) return TradeSignal.Exit; } return TradeSignal.None; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ S t r a t e g i e s \ S i g n a l F i r e S t a t s . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 1 . 4 7 K B L I N E S : 3 0 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Strategies; public sealed class SignalFireStats { public int TotalCandles { get; private set; } public int EmaLong { get; private set; } public int EmaShort { get; private set; } public int RsiLong { get; private set; } public int RsiExit { get; private set; } public int FullLongAlignment { get; private set; } public int FullShortAlignment { get; private set; } public void NextCandle() => TotalCandles++; public void CountEmaLong() => EmaLong++; public void CountEmaShort() => EmaShort++; public void CountRsiLong() => RsiLong++; public void CountRsiExit() => RsiExit++; public void CountFullLong() => FullLongAlignment++; public void CountFullShort() => FullShortAlignment++; public void Print() { Console.WriteLine("\n========== SIGNAL DIAGNOSTICS =========="); Console.WriteLine($"Candles processed : {TotalCandles}"); Console.WriteLine($"EMA Long fires : {EmaLong}"); Console.WriteLine($"EMA Short fires : {EmaShort}"); Console.WriteLine($"RSI Long fires : {RsiLong}"); Console.WriteLine($"RSI Exit fires : {RsiExit}"); Console.WriteLine($"FULL LONG ALIGNMENTS : {FullLongAlignment}"); Console.WriteLine($"FULL SHORT ALIGNMENTS : {FullShortAlignment}"); Console.WriteLine("========================================\n"); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ S t r a t e g i e s \ T r e n d P u l l b a c k S i g n a l . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 1 . 2 1 K B L I N E S : 3 0 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Strategy; using TQGA.Domain.Indicators; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Strategies; /// /// Trend-pullback signal: /// - only looks for long entries when the fast EMA is above the slow EMA /// - uses RSI pullback for better entry location /// - exits when momentum becomes stretched or trend weakens /// This is intentionally aligned with the current TQGA trend-heavy edge profile. /// public sealed class TrendPullbackSignal : ISignal { private readonly Ema _fast = new(50); private readonly Ema _slow = new(200); private readonly Rsi _rsi = new(14); public TradeSignal Evaluate(StrategyContext context) { _fast.Add(context.Price); _slow.Add(context.Price); _rsi.Update(context.Price); if (!_fast.IsReady || !_slow.IsReady || !_rsi.IsReady) return TradeSignal.None; var bullishTrend = _fast.Value > _slow.Value; if (!context.HasOpenPosition && bullishTrend && _rsi.Value <= 48m) return TradeSignal.Long; if (context.HasOpenPosition && (!bullishTrend || _rsi.Value >= 62m)) return TradeSignal.Exit; return TradeSignal.None; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ T i m e \ S i m u l a t e d C l o c k . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 2 7 K B L I N E S : 1 0 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Interfaces; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Time; public sealed class SimulatedClock : IClock { public DateTime UtcNow { get; private set; } = DateTime.UtcNow; public void Advance(TimeSpan delta) { UtcNow = UtcNow.Add(delta); } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ T i m e \ S y s t e m C l o c k . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 2 5 K B L I N E S : 1 0 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Interfaces; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Time; public sealed class SystemClock : IClock { public DateTime UtcNow => DateTime.UtcNow; public void Advance(TimeSpan delta) { // real clock does not move } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ T r a d i n g \ B a c k t e s t O r d e r E x e c u t o r . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 7 7 K B L I N E S : 2 7 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Trading; using TQGA.Domain.Trading; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Trading; public sealed class BacktestOrderExecutor : IOrderExecutor { private decimal _lastPrice; private decimal _lastFillPrice; public void UpdateMarketPrice(decimal price) { _lastPrice = price; } public Task PlaceMarketOrderAsync( string symbol, TradeSide side, decimal quantity, CancellationToken ct) { _lastFillPrice = _lastPrice; return Task.CompletedTask; } public Task ClosePositionAsync(string symbol, CancellationToken ct) { _lastFillPrice = _lastPrice; return Task.CompletedTask; } public decimal GetFillPrice() => _lastFillPrice; } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . I n f r a s t r u c t u r e \ T r a d i n g \ I n M e m o r y P o s i t i o n R e p o s i t o r y . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 8 6 K B L I N E S : 3 0 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using TQGA.Application.Trading; using TQGA.Domain.Trading; namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Trading; public sealed class InMemoryPositionRepository : IPositionRepository { private Position? _position; public bool HasOpenPosition() => _position != null; public decimal CurrentSize() => _position?.Quantity ?? 0m; public void Open(TradeSide side, decimal quantity, decimal price) { if (_position != null) return; var signedQty = side == TradeSide.Buy ? quantity : -quantity; _position = new Position( symbol: "DEFAULT", quantity: signedQty, entryPrice: price ); } public void Close(decimal price) { if (_position == null) return; _position = null; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . W i n F o r m s \ G l o b a l U s i n g s . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 0 . 0 6 K B L I N E S : 2 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = global using System; global using System.Windows.Forms; = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . W i n F o r m s \ M a i n F o r m . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 2 2 . 4 8 K B L I N E S : 5 1 9 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection; using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.IO; using System.Linq; using System.Threading; using System.Threading.Tasks; using System.Windows.Forms; using TQGA.Application.Portfolio; using TQGA.Application.Services; using TQGA.Infrastructure.MarketData; using AppBinanceUniverse = TQGA.Application.Portfolio.BinanceUniverse; namespace TQGA.WinForms; public sealed class MainForm : Form { private readonly IServiceProvider _sp; private readonly HistoricalDataBootstrapper _bootstrapper; private readonly StructureReportService _structure; private readonly FullReportService _fullReport; private readonly ReportPortalPublishService _portalPublish; private readonly GitHubPagesPublishService _gitHubPagesPublish; private const string FixedGitHubPagesRepoPath = @"C:\Users\Muhammad Arif\arifpisonium.github.io"; private Button? _btnDownload; private Button? _btnUpdate; private Button? _btnRunResearch; private Button? _btnFullReportSave; private Button? _btnFullReportClipboard; private Button? _btnPublished; private Button? _btnReportAll31; private Button? _btnGitPublished; private Label? _lblStrategies; private CheckedListBox? _strategyList; private Button? _btnSelectAll; private Button? _btnSelectNone; private Label? _lblTimeframes; private CheckedListBox? _timeframeList; private Button? _btnTfAll; private Button? _btnTfNone; private Label? _lblCoinCategories; private CheckedListBox? _coinCategoryList; private Button? _btnCatAll; private Button? _btnCatNone; private Label? _lblCoinNames; private CheckedListBox? _coinNameList; private Button? _btnCoinAll; private Button? _btnCoinNone; private static readonly Dictionary> CoinCategories = new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase) { ["Majors"] = [ "BTCUSDT", "ETHUSDT", "BNBUSDT", "SOLUSDT", "XRPUSDT", "ADAUSDT", "DOGEUSDT", "TRXUSDT", "AVAXUSDT", "DOTUSDT", "LINKUSDT", "MATICUSDT", "LTCUSDT", "BCHUSDT" ], ["DeFi"] = [ "AAVEUSDT", "UNIUSDT", "MKRUSDT", "RUNEUSDT" ], ["AI / Compute"] = [ "ICPUSDT", "FETUSDT", "RNDRUSDT", "GRTUSDT" ], ["Narrative / New Cycle"] = [ "ORDIUSDT", "TIAUSDT", "INJUSDT", "SUIUSDT", "SEIUSDT", "JUPUSDT", "WIFUSDT", "ARBUSDT", "OPUSDT" ], ["Alt Midcaps / Others"] = [ "ATOMUSDT", "APTUSDT", "NEARUSDT", "FILUSDT", "ETCUSDT", "PEPEUSDT", "SHIBUSDT", "ALGOUSDT", "VETUSDT" ] }; public MainForm( IServiceProvider sp, HistoricalDataBootstrapper bootstrapper, StructureReportService structure, FullReportService fullReport) { _sp = sp; _bootstrapper = bootstrapper; _structure = structure; _fullReport = fullReport; _portalPublish = new ReportPortalPublishService(); _gitHubPagesPublish = new GitHubPagesPublishService(); Text = "TQGA"; Width = 1550; Height = 980; StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterScreen; BuildUi(); } private void BuildUi() { _btnDownload = new Button { Text = "DOWNLOAD CANDLES DATA", Width = 220, Top = 30, Left = 30 }; _btnUpdate = new Button { Text = "UPDATE CANDLES DATA", Width = 220, Top = 80, Left = 30 }; _btnRunResearch = new Button { Text = "RUN PORTOFOLIO", Width = 220, Top = 130, Left = 30 }; _btnFullReportSave = new Button { Text = "FULL REPORT → FILE", Width = 220, Top = 200, Left = 30 }; _btnFullReportClipboard = new Button { Text = "FULL REPORT → CLIPBOARD", Width = 220, Top = 250, Left = 30 }; _btnPublished = new Button { Text = "PUBLISHED", Width = 220, Top = 300, Left = 30 }; _btnReportAll31 = new Button { Text = "REPORT ALL 31", Width = 220, Top = 350, Left = 30 }; _btnGitPublished = new Button { Text = "GIT PUBLISHED", Width = 220, Top = 400, Left = 30 }; _btnDownload.Click += async (_, _) => await RunSafe(_bootstrapper.ForceFullDownloadAsync); _btnUpdate.Click += async (_, _) => await RunSafe(_bootstrapper.UpdateAsync); _btnRunResearch.Click += async (_, _) => await RunResearch(); _btnPublished.Click += async (_, _) => await PublishPortalAsync(); _btnReportAll31.Click += async (_, _) => await BuildReportAll31WithMessageAsync(); _btnGitPublished.Click += async (_, _) => await GitPublishedAsync(); _btnFullReportSave.Click += (_, _) => { string path = _fullReport.SaveCombinedToFile(); MessageBox.Show($"Saved:\n{path}"); }; _btnFullReportClipboard.Click += (_, _) => { string text = _fullReport.BuildChatGptSizedReport(); Clipboard.SetText(text); MessageBox.Show("Copied (ChatGPT sized)."); }; _lblStrategies = new Label { Text = "Select Strategies:", Left = 300, Top = 30, Width = 220 }; _strategyList = new CheckedListBox { Left = 300, Top = 55, Width = 330, Height = 560, CheckOnClick = true }; _btnSelectAll = new Button { Text = "Select All", Left = 300, Top = 625, Width = 120 }; _btnSelectNone = new Button { Text = "Select None", Left = 430, Top = 625, Width = 120 }; _btnSelectAll.Click += (_, _) => SetAllChecked(_strategyList, true); _btnSelectNone.Click += (_, _) => SetAllChecked(_strategyList, false); _lblTimeframes = new Label { Text = "Select Timeframes:", Left = 660, Top = 30, Width = 220 }; _timeframeList = new CheckedListBox { Left = 660, Top = 55, Width = 180, Height = 140, CheckOnClick = true }; _btnTfAll = new Button { Text = "TF All", Left = 660, Top = 205, Width = 85 }; _btnTfNone = new Button { Text = "TF None", Left = 755, Top = 205, Width = 85 }; _btnTfAll.Click += (_, _) => SetAllChecked(_timeframeList, true); _btnTfNone.Click += (_, _) => SetAllChecked(_timeframeList, false); _lblCoinCategories = new Label { Text = "Coin Categories:", Left = 880, Top = 30, Width = 220 }; _coinCategoryList = new CheckedListBox { Left = 880, Top = 55, Width = 230, Height = 220, CheckOnClick = true }; _btnCatAll = new Button { Text = "Cat All", Left = 880, Top = 285, Width = 100 }; _btnCatNone = new Button { Text = "Cat None", Left = 990, Top = 285, Width = 100 }; _btnCatAll.Click += (_, _) => { SetAllChecked(_coinCategoryList, true); RefreshCoinNames(); }; _btnCatNone.Click += (_, _) => { SetAllChecked(_coinCategoryList, false); RefreshCoinNames(); }; _lblCoinNames = new Label { Text = "Coin Names:", Left = 1140, Top = 30, Width = 220 }; _coinNameList = new CheckedListBox { Left = 1140, Top = 55, Width = 230, Height = 560, CheckOnClick = true }; _btnCoinAll = new Button { Text = "Coin All", Left = 1140, Top = 625, Width = 100 }; _btnCoinNone = new Button { Text = "Coin None", Left = 1250, Top = 625, Width = 100 }; _btnCoinAll.Click += (_, _) => SetAllChecked(_coinNameList, true); _btnCoinNone.Click += (_, _) => SetAllChecked(_coinNameList, false); _coinCategoryList.ItemCheck += (_, _) => BeginInvoke(new Action(RefreshCoinNames)); Controls.AddRange( [ _btnDownload, _btnUpdate, _btnRunResearch, _btnFullReportSave, _btnFullReportClipboard, _btnPublished, _btnReportAll31, _btnGitPublished, _lblStrategies, _strategyList, _btnSelectAll, _btnSelectNone, _lblTimeframes, _timeframeList, _btnTfAll, _btnTfNone, _lblCoinCategories, _coinCategoryList, _btnCatAll, _btnCatNone, _lblCoinNames, _coinNameList, _btnCoinAll, _btnCoinNone ]); } protected override void OnLoad(EventArgs e) { base.OnLoad(e); _structure.Generate(); LoadStrategyList(); LoadTimeframeList(); LoadCoinCategories(); RefreshCoinNames(); MessageBox.Show("TQGA READY", "BOOT"); } private void LoadStrategyList() { if (_strategyList == null) return; _strategyList.Items.Clear(); using var scope = _sp.CreateScope(); var orchestrator = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService(); foreach (Type t in orchestrator.GetRegisteredStrategies()) _strategyList.Items.Add(new StrategyListItem(t), true); } private void LoadTimeframeList() { if (_timeframeList == null) return; _timeframeList.Items.Clear(); foreach (string tf in AppBinanceUniverse.Timeframes) _timeframeList.Items.Add(tf, true); } private void LoadCoinCategories() { if (_coinCategoryList == null) return; _coinCategoryList.Items.Clear(); foreach (string key in CoinCategories.Keys) _coinCategoryList.Items.Add(key, true); } private void RefreshCoinNames() { if (_coinNameList == null || _coinCategoryList == null) return; List selectedCategories = _coinCategoryList.CheckedItems .OfType() .ToList(); List selectedSymbols = selectedCategories.Count == 0 ? AppBinanceUniverse.ActiveSymbols.ToList() : selectedCategories .Where(CoinCategories.ContainsKey) .SelectMany(x => CoinCategories[x]) .Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase) .Where(x => AppBinanceUniverse.ActiveSymbols.Contains(x, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) .OrderBy(x => x) .ToList(); _coinNameList.Items.Clear(); foreach (string s in selectedSymbols) _coinNameList.Items.Add(s, true); } private static void SetAllChecked(CheckedListBox? list, bool isChecked) { if (list == null) return; for (int i = 0; i < list.Items.Count; i++) list.SetItemChecked(i, isChecked); } private async Task RunResearch() { using var scope = _sp.CreateScope(); var orchestrator = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService(); IReadOnlyList selectedStrategies = GetSelectedStrategyTypes(orchestrator); IReadOnlyList selectedTimeframes = GetSelectedTimeframes(); IReadOnlyList selectedSymbols = GetSelectedSymbols(); FrictionProfile friction = FrictionProfile.Default; await RunSafe(() => orchestrator.RunSelectedAsync( selectedStrategies, selectedSymbols, selectedTimeframes, friction, CancellationToken.None)); } private async Task PublishPortalAsync() { Toggle(false); try { var result = await Task.Run(() => _portalPublish.PublishLatestReports()); MessageBox.Show( $"Portal generated successfully.\n\n" + $"Reports: {result.ReportCount}\n" + $"Report Source: {result.ReportDirectory}\n" + $"Site: {result.SiteDirectory}\n" + $"Local Web URL: {result.LocalWebUrl}", "PUBLISHED", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information); } catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show( $"Publish failed.\n\n{ex.Message}", "PUBLISHED ERROR", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); } finally { Toggle(true); } } private async Task BuildReportAll31WithMessageAsync() { Toggle(false); try { string report31Path = await BuildReportAll31Async(copyToClipboard: true); MessageBox.Show( $"REPORT ALL 31 generated successfully.\n\n" + $"Output File: {report31Path}\n\n" + $"The formatted audit report has also been copied to clipboard.", "REPORT ALL 31", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information); } catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show( $"REPORT ALL 31 generation failed.\n\n{ex.Message}", "REPORT ALL 31 ERROR", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); } finally { Toggle(true); } } private async Task GitPublishedAsync() { Toggle(false); try { string report31Path = await BuildReportAll31Async(copyToClipboard: false); string formattedText = await File.ReadAllTextAsync(report31Path); string repoRootPath = ResolveGitRepoPath(); var publishResult = await Task.Run(() => _gitHubPagesPublish.PublishReportAll31( report31Path, formattedText, repoRootPath)); MessageBox.Show( $"GIT publish completed successfully.\n\n" + $"Local Repo: {publishResult.RepoRootPath}\n" + $"Latest Raw Text: {publishResult.PublishedLatestTextPath}\n" + $"Website Page File: {publishResult.PublishedIndexHtmlPath}\n" + $"Archive File (Local Only): {publishResult.PublishedArchiveReportPath}\n" + $"Reports Index File: {publishResult.PublishedReportsIndexPath}\n\n" + $"Public Site: {publishResult.PublicUrl}\n" + $"Public Latest TXT: {publishResult.PublicLatestTextUrl}\n" + $"Public Reports Index: {publishResult.PublicReportsIndexUrl}", "GIT PUBLISHED", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information); } catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show( $"GIT publish failed.\n\n{ex.Message}", "GIT PUBLISHED ERROR", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); } finally { Toggle(true); } } private string ResolveGitRepoPath() { if (Directory.Exists(FixedGitHubPagesRepoPath)) { _gitHubPagesPublish.SaveRepoPath(FixedGitHubPagesRepoPath); return FixedGitHubPagesRepoPath; } string? saved = _gitHubPagesPublish.TryLoadSavedRepoPath(); if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(saved) && Directory.Exists(saved)) return saved; throw new DirectoryNotFoundException( $"GitHub Pages local repository folder was not found.\nExpected:\n{FixedGitHubPagesRepoPath}"); } private async Task BuildReportAll31Async(bool copyToClipboard) { string combinedPath = await Task.Run(() => _fullReport.SaveCombinedToFile()); string rawText = await File.ReadAllTextAsync(combinedPath); string formattedText = FormatAuditReportAll31(rawText); string directory = Path.GetDirectoryName(combinedPath) ?? AppContext.BaseDirectory; string report31Path = Path.Combine( directory, $"REPORT_ALL_31_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"); await File.WriteAllTextAsync(report31Path, formattedText); if (copyToClipboard) Clipboard.SetText(formattedText); return report31Path; } private static string FormatAuditReportAll31(string input) { if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(input)) return string.Empty; string normalized = input .Replace("\r\n", "\n") .Replace("\r", "\n"); string[] lines = normalized.Split('\n'); var output = new List(lines.Length + 200); bool previousBlank = false; int blankCount = 0; output.Add("TQGA REPORT ALL 31"); output.Add("============================================================"); output.Add($"Generated (UTC): {DateTime.UtcNow:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}"); output.Add("Formatting: Wrapped / normalized / audit-friendly separation"); output.Add(string.Empty); foreach (string rawLine in lines) { string line = rawLine?.TrimEnd() ?? string.Empty; string upper = line.Trim().ToUpperInvariant(); bool isMajorHeader = upper.StartsWith("REPORT ") || upper.StartsWith("A84") || upper.StartsWith("WF ") || upper.StartsWith("WF_") || upper.StartsWith("WALK FORWARD") || upper.StartsWith("FULL REPORT") || upper.StartsWith("TQGA "); if (isMajorHeader && output.Count > 0 && output[^1] != string.Empty) output.Add(string.Empty); if (isMajorHeader) { output.Add("------------------------------------------------------------"); output.Add(line); output.Add("------------------------------------------------------------"); previousBlank = false; blankCount = 0; continue; } if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(line)) { if (!previousBlank || blankCount < 2) { output.Add(string.Empty); blankCount++; } previousBlank = true; continue; } previousBlank = false; blankCount = 0; output.Add(WrapLine(line, 140)); } return string.Join(Environment.NewLine, output); } private static string WrapLine(string text, int maxWidth) { if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text) || text.Length <= maxWidth) return text; string[] parts = text.Split(' ', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries); var lines = new List(); var current = new System.Text.StringBuilder(); foreach (string part in parts) { if (current.Length == 0) { current.Append(part); continue; } if (current.Length + 1 + part.Length <= maxWidth) { current.Append(' '); current.Append(part); continue; } lines.Add(current.ToString()); current.Clear(); current.Append(part); } if (current.Length > 0) lines.Add(current.ToString()); return string.Join(Environment.NewLine, lines); } private IReadOnlyList GetSelectedStrategyTypes(PortfolioBacktestOrchestrator orchestrator) { if (_strategyList == null || _strategyList.Items.Count == 0) return orchestrator.GetRegisteredStrategies(); List checkedItems = _strategyList.CheckedItems .OfType() .Select(x => x.Type) .ToList(); return checkedItems.Count == 0 ? orchestrator.GetRegisteredStrategies() : checkedItems; } private IReadOnlyList GetSelectedTimeframes() { if (_timeframeList == null || _timeframeList.Items.Count == 0) return AppBinanceUniverse.Timeframes; List checkedItems = _timeframeList.CheckedItems .OfType() .ToList(); return checkedItems.Count == 0 ? AppBinanceUniverse.Timeframes : checkedItems; } private IReadOnlyList GetSelectedSymbols() { if (_coinNameList == null || _coinNameList.Items.Count == 0) return AppBinanceUniverse.ActiveSymbols; List checkedItems = _coinNameList.CheckedItems .OfType() .ToList(); return checkedItems.Count == 0 ? AppBinanceUniverse.ActiveSymbols : checkedItems; } private async Task RunSafe(Func action) { Toggle(false); try { await Task.Run(action); MessageBox.Show("DONE"); } catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message); } Toggle(true); } private void Toggle(bool enabled) { if (_btnDownload != null) _btnDownload.Enabled = enabled; if (_btnUpdate != null) _btnUpdate.Enabled = enabled; if (_btnRunResearch != null) _btnRunResearch.Enabled = enabled; if (_btnFullReportSave != null) _btnFullReportSave.Enabled = enabled; if (_btnFullReportClipboard != null) _btnFullReportClipboard.Enabled = enabled; if (_btnPublished != null) _btnPublished.Enabled = enabled; if (_btnReportAll31 != null) _btnReportAll31.Enabled = enabled; if (_btnGitPublished != null) _btnGitPublished.Enabled = enabled; if (_strategyList != null) _strategyList.Enabled = enabled; if (_timeframeList != null) _timeframeList.Enabled = enabled; if (_coinCategoryList != null) _coinCategoryList.Enabled = enabled; if (_coinNameList != null) _coinNameList.Enabled = enabled; if (_btnSelectAll != null) _btnSelectAll.Enabled = enabled; if (_btnSelectNone != null) _btnSelectNone.Enabled = enabled; if (_btnTfAll != null) _btnTfAll.Enabled = enabled; if (_btnTfNone != null) _btnTfNone.Enabled = enabled; if (_btnCatAll != null) _btnCatAll.Enabled = enabled; if (_btnCatNone != null) _btnCatNone.Enabled = enabled; if (_btnCoinAll != null) _btnCoinAll.Enabled = enabled; if (_btnCoinNone != null) _btnCoinNone.Enabled = enabled; } private sealed record StrategyListItem(Type Type) { public override string ToString() => Type.Name; } } = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . W i n F o r m s \ P r o g r a m . c s T Y P E : . c s S I Z E : 2 . 2 1 K B L I N E S : 4 8 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection; using Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting; using TQGA.Application.Backtesting; using TQGA.Application.Portfolio; using TQGA.Application.Reporting; using TQGA.Application.Services; using TQGA.Application.Strategy; using TQGA.Infrastructure; using TQGA.Infrastructure.MarketData; namespace TQGA.WinForms; internal static class Program { [STAThread] private static void Main() { var host = Host.CreateDefaultBuilder() .ConfigureServices((context, services) => { services.AddInfrastructure(); services.AddSingleton(); services.AddScoped(); services.AddScoped(); services.AddScoped(); services.AddScoped(); services.AddScoped(); services.AddScoped(); services.AddScoped(); // Report / analytics services required by PortfolioBacktestOrchestrator services.AddScoped(); services.AddScoped(); services.AddScoped(); services.AddScoped(); services.AddScoped(); services.AddScoped(); // Other app services services.AddScoped(); services.AddScoped(); services.AddSingleton(); services.AddSingleton(); services.AddScoped(); }) .Build(); ApplicationConfiguration.Initialize(); using var scope = host.Services.CreateScope(); var mainForm = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService(); System.Windows.Forms.Application.Run(mainForm); } } ===== ARCHITECTURE DOCUMENTS ===== = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = F I L E : D : \ D D A T A B A C K U P \ A R I F 5 \ T Q G A \ T Q G A . A p p l i c a t i o n \ D o c s \ T Q G A _ A R C H I T E C T U R E _ S T A T E . t x t T Y P E : . t x t S I Z E : 3 . 9 6 K B L I N E S : 1 1 5 = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = ------------------------------------------------------------ TQGA â€” TRADING QUANT GLOBAL ARCHITECTURE ------------------------------------------------------------ ======================================== LAST UPDATED ------------ 2026-03-07 Institutional evolution stage: Pre-Trade Market Selection + Risk Budget Engine + True Rule-Based Walk-Forward + Liquidity/Friction Upgrade SOLUTION STRUCTURE ------------------ TQGA.Domain TQGA.Application TQGA.Infrastructure TQGA.WinForms UI CONTRACT (UNCHANGED) ----------------------- Existing controls remain: - DOWNLOAD CANDLES DATA - UPDATE CANDLES DATA - RUN PORTOFOLIO - FULL REPORT - COPY CLIPBOAR REPORTS - LIST BOX FOR SELECTING STRATEGIES WITH CHECK BOXES - LIST BOX FOR SELECTING TIME FRAMES WITH CHECK BOXES - LIST BOX FOR SELECTING COIN CATEGORIES WITH CHECK BOXES - LIST BOX FOR SELECTING COIN NAMES WITH CHECK BOXES CURRENT EXECUTION FLOW ---------------------- RUN PORTOFOLIO -> MainForm selection: strategies timeframes coin categories coin names -> PortfolioBacktestOrchestrator.RunSelectedAsync(...) -> PortfolioBacktestRunner.RunAsync(...) -> PreTradeMarketSelectionService -> PortfolioRiskBudgetEngine -> StrategyFactory + TradingEngine -> Strategy x selected Symbol x Timeframe markets -> friction-adjusted attribution -> REPORT_05 ... REPORT_13 -> A84 research layer -> CIO allocation -> Fitness gating -> TRUE walk-forward reports CURRENT DATA / EXECUTION NOTES ------------------------------ - ICandleDataFeed still exposes GetCandles(symbol, timeframe) only. - Trade domain model already supports Quantity. - BacktestOrderExecutor already accepts quantity in market order placement. - Current TradingEngine still behaves as a single-open-trade engine per strategy instance. - Therefore the safest institutional upgrade path is to apply risk budgeting at the portfolio/backtest layer first. CURRENT RISK BUDGET ENGINE -------------------------- PortfolioRiskBudgetEngine now decides how much to trust each selected market opportunity. Current dimensions: - ATR sizing - regime multiplier - 4h preference bonus - per-symbol cap - per-cluster cap - total portfolio risk cap - drawdown-based throttling - hard position value cap Purpose: - reduce concentration blowups - smooth fold dispersion - lower over-allocation to unstable markets - improve realism before deeper TradingEngine surgery CURRENT RESEARCH STATUS ----------------------- The platform currently supports: - Strategy backtesting - Symbol PnL attribution - Symbol x Timeframe PnL attribution - Strategy x Symbol x Timeframe attribution - CIO market ranking and capped allocation - Strategy fitness gating - Alpha decay monitoring - Regime classification reports - Executive compact ChatGPT upload summary - Pre-trade market selection - Symbol/category constrained backtest runs - True rule-based walk-forward rerun reporting - Risk-budgeted opportunity scaling KEY CURRENT INSIGHT ------------------- Strongest edge profile remains: - 4h - leadership markets - pullback inside trend - expansion / high-vol regime CURRENT LIMITATION ------------------ Risk budgeting currently scales trust at the portfolio/backtest layer. Full trade-by-trade portfolio budgeting inside TradingEngine remains a later upgrade. NEXT PRIORITIES --------------- 1. TradingEngine trade-level signal ranking + cooldown 2. TradingEngine-level quantity-aware risk budget integration 3. ATR position sizing per actual trade path 4. A84-driven regime integration 5. Position cap per symbol / market at execution layer 6. Hyperparameter walk-forward framework 7. Controlled shorting realism 8. Data QA + health scoring INSTITUTIONAL CONCLUSION ------------------------ ------------------------------------------------------------ TQGA is now an institutional research-grade prototype with: ------------------------------------------------------------ - pre-trade opportunity selection - symbol/timeframe constrained testing - friction-adjusted attribution - risk-budgeted opportunity scaling - true rule-based walk-forward reruns and is moving toward more complete production-grade quant architecture. ===== AUDIT COMPLETE ===== ====================================================================== FILE: WF_01_SPLITS_20260321_143853.txt ---------------------------------------------------------------------- ------------------------------------------------------------ WF_01 — TRUE WALK-FORWARD SPLITS ------------------------------------------------------------ ================================ Run Timestamp (UTC) : 2026-03-21 14:38:53 Strategies Selected : 6 METHOD ------ Rule-based walk-forward rerun. Each fold uses chronological train warmup followed by unseen test window evaluation. TEST 2024-03-01 20:00:00 -> 2025-03-06 04:00:00 | TestPoints 2217 Fold 03 | TRAIN 2022-05-06 12:00:00 -> 2025-03-06 04:00:00 | TEST 2025-03-06 08:00:00 -> 2026-03-06 16:00:00 | TestPoints 2217
